items.text:
Hello, you maybe can consider this casting, but I'm in search of voicemails of questions, comments, advice, singing, anything for an animated call-in show. Feel free to be dead serious or a total character. The callers are animated into various art styles, if you could keep it relatively short 0-45 seconds that'd be great. You can call here: 620-390-3480 

Thanks!

items.text:
**CASTING: DAE Haircare Campaign**

I'm currently casting for an upcoming DAE Haircare campaign and looking for **3 female models**.

**Shoot Date:** July 30th

**Location:** Los Angeles (studio)

**Rate:** $1,200 (12 hour day)

Looking for models ages **25–35** with **beautiful, healthy hair** who are comfortable having their hair styled on camera (including heat tools and hair products).

Seeking:
* Interesting, unique faces
* Diverse looks and features
* All body types (including curvier options)
* Models with standout, healthy hair

Hair direction includes:
* Sleek / straight styles
* Smooth, bouncy blowouts
* Natural wavy looks

Please DM me with submissions including:
* Current photos/digitals
* Hair photos/videos (natural hair preferred)
* Agency/contact information
* Availability

items.text:
📣 ACTOR CALLOUT 🥂

Looking for our perfect Roger and David to star in the debut of *Speech, Speech* at SE Fest in London! 

Please follow the link below to submit your lovely self-tapes, as well as to find the audition pack:

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header)

If you have any additional access requirements, or any further questions then please message me directly, or email [tristan.simpson99@gmail.com](mailto:tristan.simpson99@gmail.com) 📧

Share far and wide with anyone you feel would be a good fit! 

We can’t wait to see them, go crazy with it  👀 🤪

Normally he's witty, intelligent, the life and soul, however his current state it's safe to say little bit more cynical about things.'

Zum Nachhören 

Max Fraisl ist ein österreichischer Schauspieler, Performer und ein international gefragtes Lookalike von Daniel Craig. Er erlangte vor allem als professionelles „James Bond“-Double europaweit Bekanntheit. Mit ihm konnte Moderatorin ein ausführliches Interview machen.

sharedPost.text:
NOW CASTING TEEN GIRLS IN LOS ANGELES!
16 to 19y
Do you love earrings and have an awesome ear stack? We're looking for a cool, outgoing teenage girl who already has at least two pierced holes in each ear and is open to adding another piercing to continue her stack.
💰 Pays $600 for the shoot
💰 PLUS an additional $2,500 if your images are selected for use in the social media and email campaign
📍 Los Angeles Area Only
📅 Shoots August 6–7
To submit, send us a quick video:
• Tell us a little about yourself
• Show us your earrings and ear stack
• Tell us why you love them and what they mean to you
We can't wait to see your style!

Email me at: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

🟣 TEATR MŁODEGO WIDZA Z WOLIMIERZA POSZUKUJE AKTORÓW! 🟣
🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego, naucz się aktorstwa od profesjonalnych aktorów od razu na scenie i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

🔹 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

🔹 OFERUJEMY:
✅ pracę od połowy września 2026 do czerwca@ 2027(z możliwością przedłużenia)
✅ granie 2 tygodnie w miesiącu (pon–pt)
✅ atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie
✅ spektakle w całej Polsce
✅ transport i noclegi w trasie
✅ profesjonalne szkolenia z teatru formy (maski, lalki)
✅ rozwój artystyczny w kreatywnym zespole

🔹 OCZEKUJEMY:
🎙️ dobrej dykcji
🎯 dyspozycyjności na próbach we Wrocławiu od sierpnia
🎭 zaangażowania i odpowiedzialności

📧 Wyślij CV ze zdjęciem:
teatrmlodegowidza@o2.pl
📞 Kontakt: 600 236 767

📌 Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi kandydatami

POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY NON PROFIT

14.07-18.07 WARSZAWA, SKIERNIEWICE

Krótki metraż z humorem opowiada historię stereotypu ojca postawionego w realiach systemu kaucyjnego. Film przedstawia powstałe przez zachowanie ojca problemy rodzinne oraz wynikającą z tego relację, zdanego na siebie rodzeństwa.

Do etiudy do portfolio do Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukiwanych jest 

czterech MĘŻCZYZN W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli ojca, dwóch jego kolegów i sąsiada

Proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej, na telefon: 607075035, lub na maila slawinskiantoni23@gmail.com

items.text:
K.A Global© is casting for two original productions currently in development:
Theatre Production (2026)

Television Drama Series (2027)

Successful applicants will be considered for one of the two productions, depending on casting suitability.

About the Projects |

Inspired by real events, these productions blend Drama, Thriller and Suspense, spanning from the 1980s to the present day. The storytelling explores authentic British urban life, relationships, family, identity and society.

Creative references include:

Late Bloomers, Mo, Daytimers, Baps, Ramy, Snatch, Bend It Like Beckham etc.

Due to the confidential nature of the productions, further information including scripts and character breakdowns will only be shared with shortlisted applicants.

Who We're Looking For?

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: British White/Caucasian

Ages: 20's–40's

Character Type: Modern "City Girl" women

Location: Must be based in London, UK

New and emerging talent are encouraged to apply. Character development and rehearsals will be provided throughout the production process.

Compensation:

These are start-up productions currently in development. Funding will commence once production partnerships are finalised.

Following the successful pilot stage play and outstanding audience feedback, the project is progressing towards larger-scale production. Discussions and development opportunities include interest from major broadcasters and streaming platforms.

How to Apply?

DM or Email: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

Please Include:

. Headshot

. Full Name

. Phone Number

. Acting Portfolio, CV, Showreel or Spotlight/credentials (if available)

Audition self-tapes will be requested during the next stage of the casting process. Full audition guidance will be provided to shortlisted applicants.

- Casting Process

- Submit your application.

- Shortlisted applicants will receive an invitation to a casting interview.

- Audition self-tape request.

- Character discussions and project briefing.

- Final casting decisions

Availability:

Applicants should have reasonable flexibility throughout rehearsals and filming. You will not be required every day, but availability for scheduled rehearsals and production dates is essential.

Rehearsals & Training

Professional character development workshops

Experienced acting coaches

Industry agents scouting emerging talent

Rehearsals based at our Camden, London hub

Refreshments and facilities provided

Full rehearsal schedules shared well in advance

We are seeking committed, reliable and professional applicants who are genuinely interested in being part of a long-term creative production. If this sounds like someone you know, feel free to share this casting opportunity.

K.A Global Links |

Homepage: https://kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com/2025/04/kaglobalhomepage.html

Find Us On Google: https://share.google/ZqvIkPd0N8sKIyH6A

Instagram Handle: https://www.instagram.com/kaglobalofficial?utm_source=ig_web_button_share_sheet&igsh=MWdsOGV0Z2Y3YW1maw==

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/KAGlobalCastings

YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@K.AGlobalOfficial

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.summary:
K.A Global© is casting for two original productions currently in development:
Theatre Production (2026)

Television Drama Series (2027)

Successful applicants will be considered for one of the two productions, depending on casting suitability.

About the Projects |

Inspired by real events, these productions blend Drama, Thriller and Suspense, spanning from the 1980s to the present day. The storytelling explores authentic British urban life, relationships, family, identity and society.

Creative references include:

Late Bloomers, Mo, Daytimers, Baps, Ramy, Snatch, Bend It Like Beckham etc.

Due to the confidential nature of the productions, further information including scripts and character breakdowns will only be shared with shortlisted applicants.

Who We're Looking For?

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: British White/Caucasian

Ages: 20's–40's

Character Type: Modern "City Girl" women

Location: Must be based in London, UK

New and emerging talent are encouraged to apply. Character development and rehearsals will be provided throughout the production process.

Compensation:

These are start-up productions currently in development. Funding will commence once production partnerships are finalised.

Following the successful pilot stage play and outstanding audience feedback, the project is progressing towards larger-scale production. Discussions and development opportunities include interest from major broadcasters and streaming platforms.

How to Apply?

DM or Email: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

Please Include:

. Headshot

. Full Name

. Phone Number

. Acting Portfolio, CV, Showreel or Spotlight/credentials (if available)

Audition self-tapes will be requested during the next stage of the casting process. Full audition guidance will be provided to shortlisted applicants.

- Casting Process

- Submit your application.

- Shortlisted applicants will receive an invitation to a casting interview.

- Audition self-tape request.

- Character discussions and project briefing.

- Final casting decisions

Availability:

Applicants should have reasonable flexibility throughout rehearsals and filming. You will not be required every day, but availability for scheduled rehearsals and production dates is essential.

Rehearsals & Training

Professional character development workshops

Experienced acting coaches

Industry agents scouting emerging talent

Rehearsals based at our Camden, London hub

Refreshments and facilities provided

Full rehearsal schedules shared well in advance

We are seeking committed, reliable and professional applicants who are genuinely interested in being part of a long-term creative production. If this sounds like someone you know, feel free to share this casting opportunity.

K.A Global Links |

Homepage: https://kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com/2025/04/kaglobalhomepage.html

Find Us On Google: https://share.google/ZqvIkPd0N8sKIyH6A

Instagram Handle: https://www.instagram.com/kaglobalofficial?utm_source=ig_web_button_share_sheet&igsh=MWdsOGV0Z2Y3YW1maw==

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/KAGlobalCastings

StarNow: https://www.starnow.com/u/kaglobalcastings/?fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAafd7Y7z-wckZIW-Z6fLaGazvaEDNzEaLMCVc4KSOKIa4Hj3PI2RYaKUkwDoQA_aem_G413CMx_Wvhhgj4Sob6jSA

YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@K.AGlobalOfficial

Film/Media Introduction: https://youtu.be/dUjXsb9YTnI?si=idX9AmSK0yryvhIY

Talent Advert: https://youtu.be/ly-bZMUUQLk?si=Dk1PoQYo9eUJlTyw

Testimonials: https://youtu.be/QdEzUsT1P00?si=SdNB-yA_go7zmRvq

items.text:
🌟 *BIG NEWS! Welcome Emma Jane to Majestic Elite Associates!* Emma has been with Majestic doing some amazing choreography and now back with us for something spectacular! *Starting back in September*

We're incredibly excited to announce that Emma Jane will now be taking over our Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) programme as our lead choreographer!

Bringing a wealth of professional industry experience, creativity and passion, Emma is ready to inspire, challenge and develop the next generation of elite dancers.

Alongside Emma, meet Summer-Joules & Eva, two of our amazing MEA dancers who represent the standard, dedication and talent we're looking for.

✨ Could YOU be our next Majestic Elite Associate?

Expressions of Interest are 

NOW OPEN!

Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) is our audition or invitation-only elite training programme for dancers who want to perform, compete and train at the highest level.

*12 years and over - younger with exceptions of strong dancers*

✨ What you'll receive:

🏆 Elite dance & performance training
💜 Weekly inspiration and mentoring from Emma Jane
🥇 Competition opportunities, including Dance World Cup
🎭 Theatre, TV and live performance opportunities
🌍 Industry connections across the UK & Europe with the aim for paid work
🎓 Accredited examinations with UCAS points available
Commitment
📅 1 Sunday per month
➕ Optional Saturdays | 4:00pm-7:00pm
⚠️ Limited places available.
👉 Register your interest today:

https://tally.so/r/gDp48d

Train. Perform. Inspire. Become a Majestic Elite Associate. 💜💛

Hi everyone - Channel 4's HANDCUFFED is back and looking for people to take part!  

If you have strong convictions, are passionate about what you believe in and have something to say, we want to hear from you!

 

How long could you survive being handcuffed to someone who sees the world differently to you? 

 

You’ll have the chance to share your opinions, influence someone else’s perspective, and win a share of £100,000. 

To apply, visit ww.handcuffedcasting.com

sharedPost.text:
1 PLACE LEFT !!! 

One day intensive screen Master class / Workshop  

Sunday 9th August

10am-5pm

£75

Ages 16+ 

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

Director Andrew Gunn is an accomplished, versatile and highly visual director and optioned screenwriter whose diverse work encompasses premium drama, comedy, TV movies, features films and award-winning short films.
 
Having previously directed some of the most high-profile dramas of recent years, Andrew is currently in pre-production with two independent films, including THE FEARS, produced by Finite Films and KINDRED, produced by BH Movies. Cast to be announced soon.
 
Andrew has had the pleasure of working with some of the UK’s most acclaimed actors including John Simm in the Emmy-winning and BAFTA nominated LIFE ON MARS, Matt Smith, Karen Gillan and Sophie Okonedo in DOCTOR WHO, Imelda Staunton in TV movie CLAY, David Morrissey, Harry Treadaway and Felicity Jones in CAPE WRATH, Mia McKenna-Bruce in GET EVEN, not to mention Olivia Colman, Andy Serkis, Ian Hart, BAFTA Best Supporting Actress Christine Tremarco and regular collaborator Ian Puleston-Davies.
 

Studio 96 Kansas Avenue, Salford, Manchester , Media City, M50 2GZ

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

BOOKS OPEN to:
EU and UK-based, Global Majority actors, European actors, American actors (must be on Spotlight), and INTERESTING-LOOKING Actors for commercials (no need for Spotlight).

See website to apply.

ANC is a small boutique agency representing actors in film, TV, and commercials. 

ANC is a one-agent agency, and I take a personal approach and provide a lot of feedback and critique (you can't get better without a bit of constructive feedback 🫠).

P.S.
Music: Yeah, a bit of an odd song choice, but Agent-Actors is a team, and ANC could be your new home? 🫠

items.title: BOOKS OPEN especially for:

items.text:
I used to fear AI too - Then I discovered what Casting Directors still cannot automate
Future proof your acting career with practical Acting PDFs on Self tapes, AI for actors, audition techniques, character development and casting psychology. Download a free PDF sample and discover proven strategies for actors in Nairobi, Kenya, London, Los Angeles and worldwide. Visit my Payhip shop today.
Hello, creatives. Every great acting career begins the same way every great sporting story begins, with someone the world underestimated.
Watching African football continue to produce fearless teams reminds me why I believe so deeply in the power of investing in yourself. Nations once viewed as outsiders have shown that preparation, patience and consistent development can change how the world sees you. They did not simply arrive to participate. They arrived to compete, inspire and leave their mark.
Actors face the very same challenge. Today's casting industry moves faster than ever. Self tapes, AI assisted auditions, global streaming platforms and international productions have created incredible opportunities but they have also increased competition. Many talented actors ask themselves, "How do I stay relevant?" or "Will AI replace actors?"
My answer is simple. AI can analyse scripts. AI can generate voices. AI can even help you rehearse but AI cannot replace genuine human truth, emotional vulnerability, authentic connection or lived experience.
Those are the qualities casting directors still remember long after the audition ends.
That is exactly why I created my collection of Acting PDFs.
These practical guides help actors build stronger self tapes, understand casting psychology, develop memorable characters, strengthen audition confidence, navigate career longevity and learn how to use modern AI tools as preparation partners, not creative replacements.
Think of them as your acting training ground between auditions.
Whether your dream is to work in Nairobi, Cape Town, London, Lagos, Los Angeles or on international productions, investing in your craft today increases the opportunities you will recognise tomorrow.
One overlooked mistake many actors make is waiting until an audition arrives before improving. The actors who consistently book work prepare long before opportunity knocks.
If you have been wondering how to future proof your acting career, improve your self tapes, understand what casting directors truly watch for or confidently work alongside emerging AI tools, these resources were created for you.
I am also offering a FREE Acting PDF sample https://eu.docworkspace.com/d/sIIiN9uCuAar7u8UG?sa=601.1074 so you can experience the teaching style before deciding which guide best fits your journey.
Sometimes the smallest investment creates the biggest breakthrough.
If you are ready to strengthen your acting career one practical step at a time, I warmly invite you to explore my Payhip shop https://payhip.com/selftapesecrets and discover the Acting PDFs designed to help you move from hopeful auditions to confident opportunities.
👉 Visit my Payhip shop today, explore the collection, download your free sample, and take the next step toward becoming the actor your future self will thank you for.

items.summary:
I used to fear AI too - Then I discovered what Casting Directors still cannot automate
Future proof your acting career with practical Acting PDFs on Self tapes, AI for actors, audition techniques, character development and casting psychology. Download a free PDF sample and discover proven strategies for actors in Nairobi, Kenya, London, Los Angeles and worldwide. Visit my Payhip shop today.
Hello, creatives. Every great acting career begins the same way every great sporting story begins, with someone the world underestimated.
Watching African football continue to produce fearless teams reminds me why I believe so deeply in the power of investing in yourself. Nations once viewed as outsiders have shown that preparation, patience and consistent development can change how the world sees you. They did not simply arrive to participate. They arrived to compete, inspire and leave their mark.
Actors face the very same challenge. Today's casting industry moves faster than ever. Self tapes, AI assisted auditions, global streaming platforms and international productions have created incredible opportunities but they have also increased competition. Many talented actors ask themselves, "How do I stay relevant?" or "Will AI replace actors?"
My answer is simple. AI can analyse scripts. AI can generate voices. AI can even help you rehearse but AI cannot replace genuine human truth, emotional vulnerability, authentic connection or lived experience.
Those are the qualities casting directors still remember long after the audition ends.
That is exactly why I created my collection of Acting PDFs.
These practical guides help actors build stronger self tapes, understand casting psychology, develop memorable characters, strengthen audition confidence, navigate career longevity and learn how to use modern AI tools as preparation partners, not creative replacements.
Think of them as your acting training ground between auditions.
Whether your dream is to work in Nairobi, Cape Town, London, Lagos, Los Angeles or on international productions, investing in your craft today increases the opportunities you will recognise tomorrow.
One overlooked mistake many actors make is waiting until an audition arrives before improving. The actors who consistently book work prepare long before opportunity knocks.
If you have been wondering how to future proof your acting career, improve your self tapes, understand what casting directors truly watch for or confidently work alongside emerging AI tools, these resources were created for you.
I am also offering a FREE Acting PDF sample https://eu.docworkspace.com/d/sIIiN9uCuAar7u8UG?sa=601.1074 so you can experience the teaching style before deciding which guide best fits your journey.
Sometimes the smallest investment creates the biggest breakthrough.
If you are ready to strengthen your acting career one practical step at a time, I warmly invite you to explore my Payhip shop https://payhip.com/selftapesecrets and discover the Acting PDFs designed to help you move from hopeful auditions to confident opportunities.
👉 Visit my Payhip shop today, explore the collection, download your free sample, and take the next step toward becoming the actor your future self will thank you for.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: Looking for an actor to step into a paid role for a musical theatre EPK**

Hi everyone!

I'm a composer based in Cardiff. Earlier this year we held the first workshop of our original musical **Good Thinkin'**, and our next step is filming an Electronic Press Kit (EPK) to support applications to theatres and festivals.

Unfortunately, the actor playing **Richie** has had to withdraw due to a scheduling conflict, so we're looking for someone to step into the role.

**About the role:**
Richie is a comedic character who parodies an out-of-touch landlord. He appears in **one song ("Lordie!")**, so the role involves learning and performing just that number.

We're able to offer a **£100 stipend**.

**Schedule (Richie only):**
* **Sunday 19 July:** 3:15-5:30 pm (table read, sing-through & rehearsal)
* **Monday 20 July:** 1:00-1:45 pm (rehearsal)
* **Tuesday 21 July:** 1:00-1:45 pm (rehearsal)
* **Wednesday 22 July:** 1:00-1:30 pm (filming at RWCMD)

If you have any conflicts with those times, please still get in touch. We're happy to be as flexible as possible if it means we can make it work.

A little about the show:

**Good Thinkin'** is a fabulist comedy about two queer women, Arlo and Zadie, struggling to make rent in a run-down house. When they're given 30 days to leave, they discover a box of photographs hidden in the cellar that reveals a queer history of the house. The two timelines begin to speak to one another through the photographs, a séance, and the sideways nature of time. The show explores queer history, class struggle, and incorporates puppetry with a small ensemble cast.

Here's a highlight reel from our January workshop. There's also a snippet of **"Lordie!"** in the video:
[https://youtu.be/p6EsZdk_V7M?si=ieWaqnI2SrodWqp1](https://youtu.be/p6EsZdk_V7M?si=ieWaqnI2SrodWqp1)

If you're interested, **please get in touch as soon as possible** as we're hoping to lock casting today.

Feel free to comment below or contact me through my website, www.JannaGraham.com.

Thanks so much! 😊

items.text:
🎬 **Casting Call for Short Film — Filming in Vancouver**
## 📽️ Project Information
* **Title**: COUNTERFEIT
* **Production Company**: Reroute Films
* **Producers / Casting**: Junhyuk Suh, Donghun Kang
* **Project Type**: Short Film
* **Union Status**: Non-Union
* **Student Film**: No
## 💰 Compensation
* **$100/day, based on a 10-hour day**
* Meals and craft services provided
## 🎭 Audition
* **Format**: Self-Tape
## 🎥 Shoot Dates
* **Mid-October 2026**
* **Expected shoot duration**: 2–3 days
* **Location**: Vancouver and surrounding areas
## 📅 Submission Deadline

**Saturday, August 15, 2026**
## 📧 How to Apply

Please submit your application to the email below:

**📩 ****[reroutefilms@gmail.com](mailto:reroutefilms@gmail.com)**

**Email Subject Line**
> 

Your Name - Role You Are Applying For

**Please Include**
* Headshot or profile photo
* Resume
* Demo reel, if available

✅ **No acting experience required.**
✅ **Non-actors and beginners are welcome to apply.**
# 🎬 About the Film

**COUNTERFEIT** is an emotional drama about **Suyeon**, a young Korean woman struggling financially. Wanting to buy a meaningful birthday gift for her younger sister, she decides to purchase a secondhand luxury jacket. However, when she discovers that the jacket may be counterfeit, she is forced to face a difficult choice.

The film will focus on quiet, realistic performances, capturing the emotional details of the characters and their relationships with subtlety and care.
# 👤 Roles
## 🌿 Suyeon — Lead Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 20–30

A young Korean immigrant living on her own while struggling financially.

Suyeon is quiet, hardworking, and observant. She moves through the world more by watching than speaking. Although she rarely expresses her emotions openly, she carries a deep love and sense of responsibility for her younger sister.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and restrained acting
* Strong subtle facial expressions and non-verbal emotional performance
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 🌸 Yeonsu — Supporting Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 13–17

Suyeon’s younger sister.

Yeonsu is warm and bright. She may not fully understand the weight of what her older sister is carrying, but she has an honest and innocent presence.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and unforced acting
* Ability to portray a comfortable, believable sisterly chemistry
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 👩 Middle-Aged Korean Woman — Supporting Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 40–50

A woman selling a secondhand luxury jacket.

She is polite, but also firm about her position. She is not a simple villain, but a character with layered humanity and complexity.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and realistic acting
* Ability to portray subtle emotional balance
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 📢 We’d Love to Hear From You
* Korean and Korean-Canadian actors are welcome to apply
* No acting experience required
* We welcome anyone interested in natural, realistic performance

For inquiries and submissions:
📩 **[reroutefilms@gmail.com](mailto:reroutefilms@gmail.com)**

topComments.text: You have to pay minimum wage.

* Demo reel, if available

✅ **No acting experience required.**
✅ **Non-actors and beginners are welcome to apply.**
# 🎬 About the Film

**COUNTERFEIT** is an emotional drama about **Suyeon**, a young Korean woman struggling financially. Wanting to buy a meaningful birthday gift for her younger sister, she decides to purchase a secondhand luxury jacket. However, when she discovers that the jacket may be counterfeit, she is forced to face a difficult choice.

The film will focus on quiet, realistic performances, capturing the emotional details of the characters and their relationships with subtlety and care.
# 👤 Roles
## 🌿 Suyeon — Lead Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 20–30

A young Korean immigrant living on her own while struggling financially.

Suyeon is quiet, hardworking, and observant. She moves through the world more by watching than speaking. Although she rarely expresses her emotions openly, she carries a deep love and sense of responsibility for her younger sister.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and restrained acting
* Strong subtle facial expressions and non-verbal emotional performance
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 🌸 Yeonsu — Supporting Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 13–17

Suyeon’s younger sister.

Yeonsu is warm and bright. She may not fully understand the weight of what her older sister is carrying, but she has an honest and innocent presence.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and unforced acting
* Ability to portray a comfortable, believable sisterly chemistry
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 👩 Middle-Aged Korean Woman — Supporting Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 40–50

A woman selling a secondhand luxury jacket.

She is polite, but also firm about her position. She is not a simple villain, but a character with layered humanity and complexity.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and realistic acting
* Ability to portray subtle emotional balance
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 📢 We’d Love to Hear From You
* Korean and Korean-Canadian actors are welcome to apply
* No acting experience required
* We welcome anyone interested in natural, realistic performance

For inquiries and submissions:
📩 **[reroutefilms@gmail.com](mailto:reroutefilms@gmail.com)**

items.text:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia

items.text:
Cześć!

Jestem samoukiem i pracuję nad autorskim scenariuszem pełnometrażowego filmu pt. **„Oksytocyna Zero”**.

To thriller psychologiczny z elementami science fiction. Historia opowiada o kobiecie, która po latach niespełnionej miłości decyduje się poddać eksperymentalnemu zabiegowi usuwającemu zdolność odczuwania emocji. Od tego momentu role ofiary i oprawcy zaczynają się odwracać, a granica między miłością, obsesją i manipulacją całkowicie się zaciera.

Mam już przygotowany treatment oraz rozwijam pełny scenariusz. Szukam osób z doświadczeniem w branży filmowej – scenarzystów, reżyserów lub producentów – które byłyby gotowe przeczytać projekt i podzielić się swoją opinią oraz wskazówkami.

Zależy mi na szczerym feedbacku i rozmowie z kimś, kto zna realia rynku filmowego. Chętnie nawiążę kontakt.

items.text:
Hi, beautiful people! 💜

I'm hoping to tap into this amazing community for a connection.

Does anyone know a photographer in the Colorado Springs area who might be interested in donating their time for a very special local nonprofit event?

In October, Angels of America's Fallen is hosting a small, exclusive theatrical Halloween runway experience at Garden of the Gods benefiting children and families of fallen military service members and first responders. We’re hoping to capture the incredible costumes, red carpet moments, and the magic of the evening while helping raise awareness for an organization that provides long-term support to children of our fallen heroes.

We’re looking for a photographer who may be willing to donate some time to capture professional photos of the event. In return, they would receive recognition on social media, the opportunity to showcase their work, and the chance to be part of an unforgettable evening supporting an amazing cause.

If you know someone who might be interested—or if that's you!—I’d love to connect. Please comment below or send me a message.

Thank you so much! 🖤🎃✨

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL | LEAD ROLE**

Hello! We're excited to begin casting for our next short film, ***Surprise!***, a psychological thriller.

The last project we cast through Facebook acting groups, ***Esperando***, premiered at the **Sonoma International Film Festival **this year and continues its festival run. We're excited to return to this community in search of another talented actor to join us on our next production.

We're currently casting the lead role:

**MARCUS**
• Male
• Mid to Late 20s (Early 30s welcome)
• Any ethnicity

Marcus is thoughtful, charismatic, and easy to like on the surface, but beneath that exterior is someone whose perception of reality has become dangerously distorted. We're looking for an actor who can seamlessly transition between warmth, vulnerability, and quiet menace.

**Production Details**
📍 Denver or Colorado Springs, CO (TBD)
🎥 2–3 shoot days during the first two weeks of October (Exact dates TBD)
🎬 Non-Union
✨ Meals provided, IMDb credit, and footage for your demo reel

Previous film acting experience is preferred, but all qualified actors are encouraged to submit.

Additional information can be found in the submission form below. If you're interested, please complete the form to be considered for the role.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQrHFspsTa9R2eBD470XtYgBikI4WQ8RlsWfbaH-rjsEbgOQ/viewform

If you know someone who would be a great fit for Marcus, we'd greatly appreciate you sharing this post. We look forward to reviewing your submissions!

items.text:
# WROCŁAW I OKOLICE
# 

Zaczynamy produkcję nowego sezonu **Trudnych Spaw** w Polot Media co oznacza, że szukamy nowych aktorów! Proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

Zgłoszenia dla osób z **WROCŁAWIA LUB WOJEWÓDZTWA DOLNOŚLĄSKIEGO**:

**Artur Lewandowski (wiek kandydata: 31-36 l.**) **– podwładny bohaterki **

3 sceny: 21.07.2026

Atrakcyjny mężczyzna z kreatywną fryzurą. Do pracy nosi białą koszulę. Barman w restauracji. Żonaty. Rozcieńcza alkohol w pracy, przez co pozostaje w ciągłym

konflikcie z główną bohaterką.

**Wiktoria Porowska (wiek kandydatki: 23-27 l.) – oszustka **

5 scen: 21-22.07.2026

Niska, szczupła szatynka. Ubiera się skromnie i nie rzuca się w oczy. Brak cech szczególnych. Kłamliwa, chłodna, bezwzględna. Bez skrupułów oszukuje, by wyłudzić i przywłaszczyć pieniądze.

**Janusz Michalski (wiek kandydata 29-34 l.) - informatyk w firmie transportowej, kolega głównej bohaterki**

11 scen: od 21 do 23.07.2026

items.text:
⭐️NOW CASTING⭐️

The University of Michigan Entertainment Coalition -LA is proud to present a staged reading of a new feature by alum Daniel Pipski.  

Saturday, July 25th at United Talent Agency from 11a-2p.

To be a part of the magic: submit your headshot, bio and the role to : cortney.s.wright@gmail.com no later than 6p PST Wed 7/15. 

Callbacks will be no later than Thursday, July 16th. 

Virtual rehearsal on Sunday, July 19th- time TBD but will be after 4p PST. 

If cast, please plan to arrive at UTA no later than 10:15a on Saturday, July 25th. 

THERE'S ALWAYS TOMORROW — CHARACTER BREAKDOWN

RONNIE (VERONICA SHARPE)
Female, Early 20s
Brilliant, chaotic, sarcastic, and emotionally guarded. A former startup prodigy convinced Y2K will bring about the end of civilization. Lives out of her car, rejects authority, and uses humor as armor. Beneath her confidence is profound grief and loneliness.

GLENN GARRITY
Male, 30s
A hardworking tech lead who has spent years doing everything "right." Loyal, earnest, socially awkward, and desperate for approval. After losing his job and relationship in the same day, he embarks on a wild end-of-the-world adventure that forces him to let go of control.

SUPPORTING

LEILA
Female, Late 20s
Glenn's longtime girlfriend. Free-spirited, sincere, and completely unaware of how absurd her worldview sounds to others. Believes she and Glenn have been in an open relationship for years.

STEVE
Male, 40s
Glenn's charismatic boss. A polished corporate climber who makes everyone feel special while quietly looking out for himself.

HARRIS
Male, 30s
Ronnie's former business partner and ex-boyfriend. Smart, successful, and polished. Represents a painful chapter in Ronnie's past.

KATY
Female, 30s
Ronnie's former best friend and business partner. Successful, composed, and carrying unresolved history with Ronnie.

ED
Male, 30s
Leila's other boyfriend. A laid-back weed dealer who is oddly polite and well-meaning despite creating chaos wherever he goes.

DAY PLAYER / FEATURED ROLES

CONNIE
Female, 50s
Veteran accountant. Sharp, practical, and quietly amused by everyone's drama.

DAVENPORT
Male, 60s
CarCo's intimidating CEO. Old-school executive presence.

TED
Male, 20s–30s
One of Glenn's exhausted Y2K programmers. Dry sense of humor.

ROGER
Male, 50s
Corporate executive. Skeptical, confrontational, and eager to challenge Glenn.

TINO
Male, Any Ethnicity, 30s–50s
Jersey bodega owner interviewed on MTV about Y2K panic.

OLD HIPPIE LADY
Female, 60s–70s
Opinionated bank customer who gets invested in Glenn and Ronnie's argument.

TELLER
Any Gender, 20s–50s
Bank employee caught in the middle of Ronnie's chaos.

POPSTER EMPLOYEES / TECH WORKERS
20s–30s
A mix of quirky dot-com era startup employees, coders, and partygoers.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'UNIVERSITY OF MICHIGAN ENTERTAINMENT COALITION PRESENTS Daniel DanielPipski Pipski HBX Writer and producer for film and television. Pipski's credits include CO writing the film "Ticket to Paradise" (2022), starring George Clooney and Julia Roberts, and serving as an executive producer for the streaming series "The Penguin' (2024), starring Colin Farrell, for HBO Max and "A Teacher' (2020) for Hulu.'

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES LOCAL HIRE

We are currently casting the lead roles of **Cris** and **Rosa** for *Pregnant by a Demon*, a 30-minute scripted mockumentary comedy pilot shooting in Los Angeles.

**CRIS — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 18–21. Must be 18+ and able to believably portray 16. Cris is sharp, beautiful, restless, and dryly funny. She dreams of becoming more independent and escaping the chaos of her family, but beneath the sarcasm, eye rolls, and teenage defiance, she feels everything deeply. She is caught between two worlds, two languages, and two versions of herself. The role includes one brief kiss with the character of Mike.
**Works 4 days | Rate: $1,500 total**

**ROSA — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 45–65. Must be able to portray an older family matriarch through styling. Rosa is the family’s sweet-faced, sharp-tongued matriarch—warm and loving one moment, terrifying with a candle and a curse the next. She believes she is spiritually gifted, deeply misunderstood, and absolutely right about everything. Dramatic, nosy, loving, superstitious, and impossible to ignore, Rosa uses guilt, prayer, black magic, and perfectly timed insults to keep her family in line.
**Works approximately 3.5 days | Rate: $1,000 flat**

**Shoot dates:** July 20–25, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA vicinity
**Local hire only**

**Non-Union**
**Rates are all-inclusive and firm**
**Submission deadline:** July 13, 2026

Please email your **headshot, résumé, and reel** to **sheela@reigncasting.com** with the role name in the subject line.

Please **only** submit if you fit the role requirements.

Please only submit for Cris if you truly look like you can pass for high school. Submissions that do not match the requested criteria will be deleted.

STILL LOOKING - Does anyone know of an experienced Female Surfer age 45 to 60? She can be from anywhere in Canada. If yes, please pass it on! 

If selected, compensation: $10,675.00. This is for a non-union Arthritis medication campaign. Shoot is in Toronto and Halifax. Travel and accommodation will be provided. 

DEADLINE TO SUBMIT - ASAP OR BEFORE JULY 23 AT 5PM EST
For more info, please see role 1 here:

items.text:
Hey all you cool cats & kittens!!! Come have some fun in the sun!!! 

CFVA Summer Bash!!!!! Woohooo!!!

Join us for the CFVA Summer Bash, Colorado's can't-miss summer networking event for the production and media arts community! Whether you're behind the camera, in front of it, or making the magic happen behind the scenes, this is your chance to connect with fellow creatives in a fun, relaxed setting. Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!! 

• Sunday, August 2, 2026, 4:00 PM

• The Buntport Theater, Denver, Colorado 

• [https://bit.ly/4gyGys7](https://bit.ly/4gyGys7?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaTlPemlkOXN3WkxKVHd4cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6OaTol4XZ4rCwvvURQbhMX_d9BLstM6AH34hykXpEpYnyGg71WvbCy7R_jGQ_aem_AvAJiHw9laj5e1AQsFRXtA) 

Why Attend?
* IT'S SO FUN 
* Expand Your Network
* Meet filmmakers, producers, directors, editors, writers, actors, crew members, content creators, and industry professionals from across Colorado.
* Discover New Collaborations
* Whether you're looking for your next project, your next client, or your next creative partner, Summer Bash is the perfect place to start the conversation.
* Strengthen the Colorado Artist Community - across the mediums!! Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!!
* Build meaningful relationships, share ideas, and help grow a stronger, more connected community throughout the state.
* Celebrate the Industry
* Take a break from production schedules and enjoy an afternoon with the people who make Colorado's media industry thrive.

Event Highlights

• Free Admission – Everyone is welcome, but registration is encouraged.

• Food Trucks On Site – Grab dinner or a snack from a selection of local food trucks offering a variety of delicious options for purchase.

• Indoor & Outdoor Venue – Stay cool and comfortable at the unique Buntport Theater. 

• Networking & Community – Make new connections, reconnect with familiar faces, and celebrate Colorado's vibrant production/performing arts industry.

Whether you're a longtime CFVA member, new to the industry, or simply curious about Colorado's creative community, the CFVA Summer Bash is a welcoming opportunity to meet new people, exchange ideas, and build relationships that can lead to future collaborations.

Register today and join us on August 2 for an afternoon of community, conversation, and connection. We can't wait to see you at the Summer Bash!

items.text:
Hello all, 

First off, thank you for your overwhelming support and application for “Miss. Lonelyhearts Memory Light” - I made a post on here for our feature a few weeks ago and received way more engagement than I expected. Because of this community, we have been able to track down the perfect cast for our film and my heart is full. Now I only have one major role left to cast -

Delia - Female, Age 35 - 50 - Kids foster Mom. Appears primarily at the beginning and end of the film. In the finale, she is dressed completely in white, representing the "safe place" Kid eventually chooses over her father. Currently scheduled for August 5th and 7th.

If interested, please send an email to rowanharper386@gmail.com and be sure to attach a headshot and a reel if you have it. Note, we are currently working with deferred pay and I’d be happy to discuss that with you.

Additionally, we are looking for 1-3 child extras (Ages 8-12) for our first shoot day, this Wednesday - July 15th. If you have a child who would be interested, or know someone who does, please send me an email and I’d be happy to answer any questions.

Hope to chat soon,
Rowan

topComments.text: Is 15 too old for a child extra?

items.title: Hello all,

items.text:
STILL NEED 2-3 PARTS FOR "MYSTERY BOXES"
July 25, each part requiring 2-3 hours.

DAD/CUSTOMER 

Male, 30-55 years old

A dad looking to buy gifts for his wife and son in the laziest way possible.

BAD/OMINOUS MAN 

Male 25-60 years old

An ethereal character of vague origins. Imposing, scary.

REPORTER

Female, 20-40 years old

A news reporter on-site describing a situation.

Each role pays $15/hr.

Message me for any details. Looking for brief audition videos which I can provide lines for.

Thank you!

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

topComments.text: Hallo ich bin am 5.8. In Berlin solltet ihr suchen. Mein Kiezkomparsen Profil läuft auf Christin Bell Danke und Viele liebe Grüße!

items.text:
Grüßt euch,                                                                   
ein 14-jähriges Kind mit viel Motivation und wenig Erfahrung im Schauspielbereich, sucht Schauspieljobs, um Erfahrungen zu sammeln, damit sie einmal ihren großen Traum, ein beliebter Schauspieler zu sein erfüllen kann. 
Sie sucht Jobs ausschließlich in Bayern, falls jemand helfen kann oder eine Firma oder einen Filmproduzer kennt, bitte bei uns melden. 
Sprachen: Englisch, Deutsch und Ungarisch.
Wir würden uns sehr freuen! 
Vielen Dank für das Zuhören.                                           
  
Liebe Grüße❤️

topComments.text: Ich empfehle TalentiQ in Düsseldorf bei Roxane

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

TENTH MAN FILMS is seeking to film an Independent Feature Film – Funding Teaser Trailer.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17"

An ambitious independent feature film is seeking an exceptional lead actress for a professionally produced teaser trailer to support feature film financing.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17" is a contained horror thriller with political suspense, blending the claustrophobic tension of "Buried" with the global stakes of "Contagion" and the relentless urgency of "24".

When a catastrophic zombie outbreak traps an international diplomat inside Room 17 of a failing hotel, she must stop the world descending into nuclear war using nothing but her intelligence, determination and a rapidly dying mobile phone—all without ever leaving the room.

The Role
This is a performance-led role for an actress capable of carrying the screen almost entirely through visual storytelling.
The teaser contains no dialogue, requiring subtle, truthful and emotionally engaging performance through expression, physicality and screen presence alone. The character is intelligent, composed and resourceful, but as events unfold she is pushed to her emotional and physical limits.

This is an exciting opportunity to become the face of a feature film currently entering the finance stage, with the intention of attaching cast and moving into full production following successful funding.

Casting Brief:
Female
Playing age: 35–55
Professional actress or experienced model with excellent on-camera presence.
Able to convey complex emotion without dialogue.
Strong dramatic ability and confident carrying scenes alone.
Previous film or television experience welcomed but not essential.

Shoot Details
Location: North West England
Shoot: One weekday afternoon/evening during July or August
Duration: Approximately 4–6 hours
Fee: £120

To Apply
Please submit:

Headshot.
Spotlight or Backstage profile.
Showreel (if available).
Current location (Cheshire based talent preferred, as there is no travel budget).
Weekday availability during July and August 2026 (TBC upon availability of cast actress/model).

Shortlisted applicants may be invited to attend an informal Zoom meeting before casting.

To contact, email MJB at tenthmanfilms@outlook.com

To Apply
Please submit:

Headshot.
Spotlight or Backstage profile.
Showreel (if available).
Current location (Cheshire based talent preferred, as there is no travel budget).
Weekday availability during July and August 2026 (TBC upon availability of cast actress/model).

Shortlisted applicants may be invited to attend an informal Zoom meeting before casting.

To contact, email MJB at tenthmanfilms@outlook.com
items.title: CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

items.text:
Evalution Media and SwanWing Productions are teaming up to bring you a triple-bill of short plays - including the adaptation of Eva Marie Wilshere 's multi-award winning short film, The Year Dot 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Each play is a one-hander (with the exception of the carer at the end of The Year Dot, the longest of the three plays)

We're looking to cast the perfect actress for both Dot and Brenda, paying equity rates of at least £133 for each of the two performances in Nov/early Dec.

**[Saskia Wesnigk-Wood](https://www.linkedin.com/in/saskia-wesnigk-wood-b75a48222/)** of SwanWing Productions will also be auditioning for a male identifying actor for one of her two short plays.
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
All auditions are on Sunday 19th July 2-4pm - please contact us to see the script excerpts in advance **[info@evalutionmedia.com](mailto:info@evalutionmedia.com)**

items.text:
Actors, we see you. 💙

The endless self-tapes, radio silence after auditions, and constant anxiety — it’s draining. But the biggest barrier usually isn’t your talent. It’s a system that makes genuine connection harder.

Swipe through → to understand the challenges many actors face and why live auditions (when done right) can be incredibly valuable for you and the project.

At Gratwick, we’re committed to doing better. We champion actors with real support, respect, and meaningful opportunities — including live auditions where your full presence can shine.

Shoutout to our lead Antonio Sabato Jr — thank you for bringing so much heart to this project!

Ready to create with a team that has your back? Drop a 🎥 below or send us a message. We’d love to hear from you.

Tag an actor friend who needs this reminder 👇

#ActorsLife #Acting #LiveAuditions #ActorSupport #FilmProduction #Casting #IndieFilm

sharedPost.text:
Liebe Grüße aus Jamaika – zumindest musikalisch! 🇯🇲☀️

Mit meinem neuen Album „BENEATH THE JAMAICAN SUN“ nehme ich euch mit auf eine Reise voller warmer Reggae-Rhythmen, tiefer Gefühle und Geschichten aus einem langen, bewegten Leben.

Eine reife, raue Stimme erzählt von Liebe und Verlust, von Erinnerungen, Hoffnung und der Kraft, trotz aller Narben weiterzugehen – getragen vom Klang der Karibik und der Wärme der jamaikanischen Sonne.

Ich wünsche euch viel Freude beim Zuhören und freue mich sehr über eure Reaktionen. 🎶🌴

Didier Junk – BENEATH THE JAMAICAN SUN

Exclusive Album Preview

sharedPost.text:
Workshop in Wiesbaden beim Rockchor 60+

Was für eine intensive, lehrreiche und freudige bewegungs-/atmungs- und sängerisch herausfordernde Zeit für meine Teilnehmer,  meines gestrigen Workshops!
Völlig verschwitzt, bei gefühlt 40 Grad im Saal und dennoch freudigst strahlend und zufrieden, haben alle nach 3 Stunden intensivster Arbeit und Zuhörens,  den Saal verlassen!
Was gibt es Schöneres!

Danke an Euch alle!

Auf bald ,

Eure 
Annette Kuhn

sharedPost.text:
🎸 Guitar Setup – Action Adjustment

This guitar arrived for a professional setup focused on lowering the action and improving playability.

Work to be done:
✔ Action adjustment
✔ Neck relief check
✔ Intonation calibration
✔ Bridge setup
✔ Hardware check
✔ Final playability test

Lower action can make the guitar feel smoother, faster and more comfortable to play — without losing stability or tone.

📍 Berlin
📲 WhatsApp: +49 151 2478 2561

✅ Free diagnostic available
DM to book your guitar or bass setup.

True Repertory Theatre is looking for your new play submissions!!

Details below

sharedPost.text:
ATTN PLAYWRIGHTS: SEEKING NEW PLAY SUBMISSIONS!

True Repertory Theatre is seeking new play submissions for our September production of Playwright's Platform, a weekend of staged readings of new plays. We are proud to produce this festival for the third consecutive year!

INFO:

CONCEPT: Script in hand, staged readings.

LOCATION: The Beal House, 222 Main St., Kingston, MA.

REHEARSALS: September 20, 21, 23

PERFORMANCES: Friday, September 25 & Saturday, September 26 at 8pm & Sunday, September 27 at 3pm

DIRECTORS/ACTORS:  If your script is chosen, a director/actors will be provided.

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: Friday, August 14th 

SUBMISSIONS: Please send your script to: Truerepertorytheatre@gmail.com    Feel free to submit 10 minute plays, one-acts, full length!

Thank you & we look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
A Conversation initiated by TheWorkbook and Center Stage Magazine about the Future of Voice....

 

https://publications.castingworkbook.com/center-stage-june-2026-u32t4yfpma/full-view.html

 

 

There has never been a more important time to talk about the human voice and the person behind it.

In our current June/July edition of Center Stage by TheWorkbook, we sat down with Tim Friedlander, Tanya Buchanan, Simon Kennedy, and Memo Sauceda, the Presidents of the Voice Actor Associations in the United States, Canada, Australia, and LATAM, respectively, along with many others. The conversations kept landing in the same place: audiences want connection, clients want authenticity, and the performers who understand that the voice is the vehicle, not the destination, are the ones building careers that last.

This edition isn’t a panic piece about AI. It’s the opposite. It’s a front-row seat to an industry that is getting clearer about what it values.

Watch the trailer below as Host Trevar Fox introduces his interview with Tim, Tanya, Simon, and Memo and click the link in the comments to read the full edition.

 

https://youtu.be/nFvuG6vXk5U?si=n2QsDtcdp3UPmGUJ

items.text:
# 🎬 CASTING CALL | *GREEN ROOM*

**"Is holding onto someone worth losing yourself?"**

In 2005, two teenage best friends discover a mysterious hidden room inside their high school that reveals visions of their futures, forcing one of them to choose between loyalty and the life he truly wants.

We're currently casting for our upcoming Vancouver Film School short film, **Green Room**, and are looking for passionate performers to join the project! We welcome both experienced actors and those who are just starting out.

If you're interested, please send your **headshot, self-tape, resume (if available), and demo reel (if available)** to:

**📧 ****[greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com)**

Due to our production schedule, **we will be casting directly from self-tapes.** We will **not** be holding in-person callbacks or a second round of auditions, as we are working with a very quick turnaround.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
## Production Information

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Shoot Dates:** July 30, July 31 & August 1, 2026
**Production:** Vancouver Film School
**Genre:** Coming-of-Age / Supernatural Drama
**Union Status:** Strictly Non - Union performers
**Compensation:** Volunteer / Non-paid. IMDb credit, demo reel footage, meals/craft services, and a **$10/day lunch stipend** will be provided.
## Roles
**ORRIN** *(Lead)*

**Male | Asian | Playing Age 18 - 25**

Orrin is charismatic, funny, impulsive, and impossible to ignore. He uses humor and reckless behavior to hide how deeply insecure he feels about himself and his future. Unlike Malik, Orrin has already convinced himself that he will never escape his hometown or become anything more than what he grew up around. He masks his fear with jokes, but underneath that energy is someone terrified of being abandoned and left behind by the one person who truly understands him—Malik. Orrin depends heavily on their friendship, even if he would never openly admit it. He is energetic, emotionally reactive, and constantly searching for distraction so he doesn't have to confront his own hopelessness. Despite his flaws, he is deeply lovable and genuinely cares about Malik.

**MR. BLOCK** *(Supporting)*

**Male | Any Ethnicity | Playing Age 35+**

The principal of Lawson High School. Strict, blunt, and tired of dealing with students who waste their potential. While he comes across as intimidating and frustrated, there is genuine concern underneath his authority.
## Audition Process

**🎥 Self-Tape Deadline:** **July 16, 2026**

Please submit:
* Headshot
* Self-tape
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel (if available)

Casting decisions will be made directly from submitted self-tapes. Due to our production timeline, there will be **no callbacks or second-round auditions**.

We look forward to seeing your submissions!

items.text:
CASTING CALL - "SLEEPOVER MOVIE" 

In the spring of 2016, 12 year old Alissa gets invited to a sleepover by the coolest girl she knows. But when things don't go to plan, she is forced to confront her insecurities in the maze of her mind.

Looking for volunteers to cast in this project! We are super open to having non-actors or actors at all levels of experience. If you are interested, please submit a headshot, introductory paragraph, resume or demo reel (whatever you have access to is perfect) to sleepovermovie2016@gmail.com.

Feel free to reach out on fb if you have any questions. 

Info/characters:

Vancouver, BC

August 8-9 

Non-union, volunteer 

And here are the roles!

• ALISSA  –  12 (Actor's age is flexible) Alissa is an angsty and socially awkward preteen who is used to finding herself on the outskirts of friend groups. She idealises the lives of girls who can easily belong.

• RACHEL - 12 - Outgoing and confident, she has been friends with Alissa since they were little. 

• TONYA - 12 The cooler, richer girl that stole Alissa’s best friend Rachel. Behind her glamorous facade, Tonya is compulsively obsessed with giving the appearance of a perfect life and maintaining her perfect best friend.

• NATALIE - 12 (Actor must be francophone) She is friends with Tonya and best friends with Natasha. 

• NATASHA - 12 - Likes to think of herself as more grown-up and nonchalant than the other girls. She is best friends with Natalie. 

 •JULES - 12 - She is a conformist who thrives on Tonya’s attention.

"In a world of betrayal, what happens when the betrayer becomes the betrayed?"
A comedy of misunderstandings, mistaken identities, and gender identity.

We're still searching for the character of Mr Red and his wife!! Rehearsals this and next months! 

Mr. Red

Meticulous, precise, and constantly anxious. A bisexual man.

Mrs. Red

A sweet, caring, and understanding wife, often a little naïve.

Rehearsals

Rehearsals will take place during July and August, on dates and times to be agreed upon, at East 15 Acting School – Loughton Campus. LONDON

"In a world of betrayal, what happens when the betrayer becomes the betrayed?"
A comedy of misunderstandings, mistaken identities, and gender identity.

We're still searching for the character of Mr Red and his wife!! Rehearsals this and next months! 

Mr. Red

Meticulous, precise, and constantly anxious. A bisexual man.

Mrs. Red

A sweet, caring, and understanding wife, often a little naïve.

Rehearsals

Rehearsals will take place during July and August, on dates and times to be agreed upon, at East 15 Acting School – Loughton Campus. LONDON

https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1LLqtn2Tnh/

**Casting Call - Paid - Corporate Shoot **

**We are looking for the following non-speaking roles:**

**Talent 1: **Thai male (dad), mid 60s

**Talent 2: **Thai female (mum), mid 60s

**Talent 3: **Thai female (early 40s)

This is for an upcoming advertising campaign in Thailand. The shoot will be in London on 28th July. 

This is a **paid opportunity**, and while acting experience is welcome, it is **not essential**. We're primarily looking for someone with a warm, natural personality who would be comfortable on camera.

Please contact uk.admin@synima.com for more information. Thanks!

items.text:
📸** Suche Fotograf:in für Model-Digitals / Polaroids**

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich suche jemanden, der professionelle **Model-Digitals / Polaroids** von mir fotografieren kann – idealerweise im Studio mit cleanem Tageslicht-Look. Die Bilder sind für meine Sedcard und Bewerbungen bei Modelagenturen.

**TFP wäre super**, alternativ zahle ich auch gerne eine faire Aufwandsentschädigung.

Falls jemand Interesse hat oder jemanden empfehlen kann, freue ich mich über eine Nachricht. 😊

⸻

📸** Looking for a photographer for model digitals / polaroids**

Hi everyone! 👋

I’m looking for a photographer to shoot a set of professional **model digitals / polaroids**, ideally in a studio with a clean natural daylight look. The photos will be used for my modeling portfolio and agency applications.

**TFP would be great**, but I’m also happy to pay a reasonable fee if preferred.

Feel free to message me if you’re interested or know someone who might be a good fit. Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m Nanda, a Berlin-based Fashion, Beauty & Portrait Photographer with over 15 years of experience. I’m currently looking for opportunities in Photography, Photo Retouching/Editing, or Social Media Content Management anywhere in Germany.

I have about 4 months left on my Opportunity Card (Chancenkarte) and will be applying for an extension at the end of this month. A job in my field would also help me transition to a German work visa.

At the moment, I’m working part-time in a German restaurant while actively searching for a creative role.

If you know of any openings or can refer me, I’d truly appreciate your support.

🌐 Portfolio: https://nandasphotography.com

📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nanda.prophotographer

✨ Fashion & Beauty: https://www.instagram.com/eurofashion.nanda

Thank you so much! 🙏

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR A THRILLER/HORROR SHORT FILM! NO ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED!
Checkout @grimaldyproductions on all social medias including YouTube for previous award-winning works.

COPY, CREDIT, LUNCH PROVIDED (UNPAID)

We are shooting July 19-20th. Lunch will be provided!

Please contact me for any questions, comments or concerns or if you are interested in being a crew member.

Note 1: Some characters like the missing teens will only need to be on set one day for one or two hours.

Note 2: You do not have to be the age listed on this poster, you can audition for an older or younger character.

Note 3: The News Anchor role can be acted on the actor's schedule, not necessarily the exact shooting dates

Hi everyone!
Our independent theater group is preparing a presentation of selected scenes from Luigi Pirandello’s Six Characters in Search of an Author. I’m looking for someone to run the lights and sound during the rehearsals and performance. Experience with ETC Nomad is preferred.

Schedule:

July 21 and 22 — rehearsals from 3:00 to 6:00 PM

July 24 — performance from 5:00 to 9:00 PM

Location: John DeSotelle Studio, Hell’s Kitchen

Total budget: $180

Please message me if you’re interested or know someone who may be available.

7326209690

raurahimova@gmail.com

items.text:
Casting Call for a short film/thriller - female lead - Non-Union 

Compensation - Paid

Seeking an actor for the lead female role in an independent short film in the genre of a crime thriller. 

Looking for a female approximately 25-30 with dark brunette hair

Strong Screen presence and emotional range is required

This is a paid lead role for an actor who can bring authenticity, emotional depth, and a compelling on-screen presence to the character. 

Filming Location - Orange County, California 

Filming Date August 2026

To submit, please send. **

1. Name 
2. Age 
3. Recent headshot and current photos
4. Acting resume and/or demo reel (if available) 
5. Contact Information      

**Submit your materials [artisanworldstudios@gmail.com] 

**Email Subject:** FEMALE LEAD ROLE 

We look forward to seeing your submission!

topComments.text: Very interested, I would be willing to wear a realistic wig? I have dark red hair, unless thats something that could be worked with?

items.text:
🎬 SCRIPTWRITERS WANTED LENICO PRODUCTIONS ✍️
I’m currently developing a zero budget independent film based in Liverpool and I’m looking for passionate scriptwriters who want to collaborate and help bring an original story to life.

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain experience, and be part of an ambitious independent production from the ground up.

What you’ll gain from being involved:

✍️ Official writing credit on the final production

🎬 See your ideas developed into a real film project

📁 Build your writing portfolio and screenplay experience

🤝 Collaborate with actors, directors and other creatives

🌟 Gain valuable experience within an independent film production

📽️ Potential opportunities to work on future Lenico Productions projects

🎭 Have your storytelling showcased on screen

I’m looking for writers interested in:

🎭 Crime

🎬 Drama

⚡ Thriller

🧟 Horror

😂 Comedy

📺 TV & Film

Whether you’re experienced or just starting out, if you’ve got ideas and enjoy storytelling, I’d love to hear from you.

📧 Email: cheethamlennie55@gmail.com

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy, or you know someone who might be interested, please get in touch or share this post.

🎥 Let’s create something together.

#Scriptwriter #Screenwriter #Liverpool #IndependentFilm #ZeroBudgetFilm #Filmmaking #Screenplay #WritersWanted #LenicoProductions

items.text: Say it louder for the people at the back 🎤

sharedPost.text:
Dylan Has Autism and Is Chasing His Dream of Becoming a Full-Time Actor ❤️ Please Watch His Story

Dylan has autism, but that has never stopped him from pursuing his dream of becoming a full-time actor. Every audition, every role, and every opportunity brings him one step closer to achieving what he's worked so hard for.

This video shares Dylan's journey, his determination, and the passion that drives him every single day. If his story inspires you, the best way you can support him is by watching the full video, leaving a comment, and sharing it with others.

Thank you for taking a few minutes to support Dylan's dream. ❤️

#Autism #AutismAcceptance #AutismAwareness #Actor #acting

items.text:
🟣 TEATR MŁODEGO WIDZA Z WOLIMIERZA POSZUKUJE AKTORÓW! 🟣
🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego, naucz się aktorstwa od profesjonalnych aktorów od razu na scenie i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

🔹 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

🔹 OFERUJEMY:
✅ pracę od połowy września 2026 do czerwca@ 2027(z możliwością przedłużenia)
✅ granie 2 tygodnie w miesiącu (pon–pt)
✅ atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie
✅ spektakle w całej Polsce
✅ transport i noclegi w trasie
✅ profesjonalne szkolenia z teatru formy (maski, lalki)
✅ rozwój artystyczny w kreatywnym zespole

🔹 OCZEKUJEMY:
🎙️ dobrej dykcji
🎯 dyspozycyjności na próbach we Wrocławiu od sierpnia
🎭 zaangażowania i odpowiedzialności

📧 Wyślij CV ze zdjęciem:
teatrmlodegowidza@o2.pl
📞 Kontakt: 600 236 767

📌 Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi kandydatami

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'TEATR MŁODEGO WIDZA WOLIMIERZA POSZUKUJE AKTORÓW! NIE DOSTAŁEŚ SIĘ DO SZKOŁY TEATRALNEJ, MARZYSZ, ŻEBY ZOSTAĆ AKTOREM. ICO BĘDZIESZ ROBIŁ PRZEZ KOLEJNY ROK? Wrócisz "studium aktorskiego", plaçąc drogie czesne którymmasz umiejętności kolejny drogi recytatorski kogoś egzaminie będzie chciała tego słuchać, "ustawka" zabija Twoją kreatywność IDZ W PRZYSZŁYM ROKU NA EGZAMIN nie kandydat na aktora!!! AKTOR. ROZWIŃ TALENT PRACUJĄC W TEATRZE Pod okiem zawodowych aktorów, grając spektakle dla widowni całej Polsce. KOGO SZUKAMY? OFERUJEMY: pracę połowy 2026 które chcą nauczyćs aktora OCZEKUJEMY: wynagrodzenie dobrej dykcji transportinoclegi dyspozycyjności na próbach Wrocławiu ierpnia zespole zaangażowania odpowiedzialności WYŚLIJCVZEZDJĘCIEM: teatrmlodegowidza@o2.pl SKONTAKTUJEMY WYBRANYMI KOTAKT: 600 767'

sharedPost.text:
Oferta pracy ! 

Poszukujemy kobiet do reklamy znanej marki kremów!

✔ Wiek: 20–35 lat
✔ Mile widziana naturalna uroda i swoboda przed kamerą.
✔ Atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie.

📩 Zgłoszenia wyłącznie w komentarzu pod postem. Dołącz aktualne zdjęcie i napisz, ile masz lat. Skontaktujemy się z wybrany uczestnikami w celu zaproszenia na casting.

media.ocrText: May be an image of hair product and text that says 'OFERTA PRACY DOŁĄCZ DO NASZEGO ZESPOŁU! Znana marka kremów poszukuje energiczneji kreatywnej Kobiety w wieku 20-35 lat do współpracy w branży reklamowej. KREATYWNE PROJEKTY Realizuj Realizuj kampanie dla znancj marki PRZYJAZNA ATMOSFERA Pracuj Pracujwzgranyn zgranym iwspierajacym zespale ROZWÓJ IMOŻLIWOŚCI Zdobądż doświadczenie swoje umiejętności OFERUJEMY 12.000 zł NETTO + -PRAWA AUTORSKIE DO KAŻDEGO PROJEKTU JESTEŚ ZAINTERESOWANA? ZGŁOSZENIA w KOMENTARZU! Napisz kilka słów sobieidołącz sobie dołącz portfolio lub przykładowe realizacje. Twórz piękno. Razem z nami. PIĘKNO JAKOŚĆ PASJA IZAANGAŻOWANIE ZGRANY ZESPÓŁ MARKA, KTÓREJUFASZ UFASZ KTÓREJ'

‼️ WARSZAWA 16 LIPCA‼️
Do prób kamerowych jako stand-in’ów poszukujemy MĘŻCZYZN i KOBIETĘ z podobnymi włosami/zarostem:

▪️ MĘŻCZYZNA z lokami, włosy ciemny blond/braz, niebieskie oczy wzrost ok 170cm

▪️ MĘŻCZYZNA z broda, ciemne oczy, wzrost ok 185cm

▪️ KOBIETA AFROAMERYKANKA, szczupła, z fryzurą AFRO 

 

Próby kamerowe mają nie trwać cały dzień. Stawka wynosi 170zł płatne po planie. 

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami SYLWETKA i TWARZ, przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując “PRÓBA”

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Plenerowy wieczór filmowy!
W najbliższy piątek zapraszamy Państwa na wyjątkowy pokaz filmu „Jutro będziemy szczęśliwi” pod gołym niebem.

📅 17 lipca
🕘 Godzina 21:00
📍 Plac 15 Sierpnia
Film przeznaczony dla osób powyżej 12 roku życia

Przyjdź, usiądź wygodnie i spędź letni wieczór z dobrym kinem w wyjątkowej atmosferze. Do zobaczenia!

Feature Film: Forgive & Forget

Think Strong Productions, LLC

We are seeking talented actors for an upcoming professional table read of the feature film Forgive & Forget, taking place in September 2026 in Manhattan, New York City.

About the Film

Forgive & Forget tells the story of a daughter forced to care for the father who destroyed her childhood—only to discover that Alzheimer’s disease has transformed him into someone she barely recognizes. A moving drama exploring childhood trauma, generational healing, and the complicated nature of forgiveness.

This table read is an important development step for the project and will lead into a staged reading prior to feature film casting and rehearsals.

Compensation for one day table read: 

* SAG-AFTRA/Union Actors: $250

* Non-Union Actors: $150

Casting Notice

Please read the character descriptions carefully before submitting. Authentic representation is a priority for this project, and we are seeking actors who can authentically portray the cultural backgrounds and life experiences of these characters.

Seeking: 

LORETTA DE GANNES (Lead)

Female, 56. Black, Barbadian-American. Brilliant, disciplined data scientist carrying decades of unresolved childhood trauma beneath an outwardly composed exterior.

WELLY CULPEPPER (Lead)

Male, 82. Black, Barbadian-American. Vietnam veteran living with Alzheimer’s. Requires an actor capable of portraying both the abusive father of the past and the gentle man he has become.

GARRET DE GANNES (Lead)

Male, 58. Black, Trinidadian-American. Loretta’s husband. Compassionate, emotionally intelligent, and the moral center of the story.

SHA’SHAUNA “SHAZZY” CULPEPPER (Supporting Lead)

Female, 58. Black, Barbadian-American. Loretta’s estranged sister who never forgives their father and serves as the emotional counterpoint to the story.

JULES CULPEPPER (Supporting Lead)

Female. Mother of Loretta and Shazzy. Quiet strength and emotional depth. Appears in flashbacks.

JIMMY CLARKE (Supporting)

Male, 80. Black, Barbadian-American. Vietnam veteran and Welly’s lifelong friend. Warm, steady, and deeply compassionate.

ROBERTO ALVAREZ (Supporting)

Male, late 30s. Director of Memory Care. Warm and personable. (Role may also be considered as Roberta Alvarez.)

YOUNG WELLY (Supporting)

Male, 20s. Black, Barbadian-American. Charismatic and full of promise before the trauma of war.

CEO JACK WEB (Supporting)

Male, 50s–60s. Confident CEO overseeing Loretta’s work.

CAPTAIN THOMAS HOLDEN (Supporting)

Male, 40s–60s. Army officer with a calm, respectful presence.

GENERAL HARTWELL (Supporting)

Male, 60s+. Senior Department of Defense official.

BRIAN DUNLEAVY (Supporting)

Male, 80s. Irish-American from Queens. Marine veteran.

*Submission Instructions:

Please email: ericabeckerofficial@gmail.com

Subject Line:

Your Name – “Forgive & Forget Submission”

Please include:

* Headshot

* Resume

* Demo reel or performance clip/monologue

* Character(s) you are submitting for

* Your availability throughout September 2026

We look forward to discovering exceptional actors to help bring this powerful story to life.

items.text:
CASTING CALL

TITLE: Waiting on the Sky

GENRE: Drama/Comedy

LOGLINE: Three friends wait for the imminent alien arrival. On a rooftop patio they learn more about each other and uncover what they are really waiting for. 

ROLES:

Keely - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the alien hunter

Janice - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the supportive friend

Gordie - A young man in his 20s/30s, the uninvested doubter

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Denver Community Media. We are Denver’s community media access program and set up productions for students to get hands-on experience.

WRITER/DIRECTOR: Austin Anderson

PRODUCTION TYPE: Student Short Film

CONCTACT: Austin.Anderson@denvergov.org

RUN TIME: ~10 minutes

COMPENSATION: Unpaid

UNION STATUS: Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION: Self Tape or in-person at Denver Community Media

SHOOT DATES: July 16th and 17th from 5pm - 9pm. Must be available for both dates. 

Cheers!

items.text:
Looking for FEATURED EXTRAS for a short film shooting this Sunday!

Title: "The Remaking of Angela"

Logline: On the brink of losing everything, a broke fledgling writer guided by her hero, dives into a short film contest with her best friends only to find their amatuer efforts derailed by a longtime rival, and maybe even the law. 

When: Sunday, July 12th

8:30 AM - 11:30 AM

Who: This film features a black woman protagonist, and we're especially looking for diverse people of all ages for this scene! A good opportunity for aspiring actors, those new to Denver, or anyone looking to meet new people and network with local indie filmmakers.

Wear: The film is set in the mid-late 1990s. Anything that could pass for that era is preferred.

Come drop by for a few hours in the morning and have fun with us on set!

If interested, please fill out this form, and we'll be in touch to confirm:
items.title: The Remaking of Angela Extras 7/12

items.text:
# 🎬 Darsteller:innen gesucht (m/w/d) – Social Media Videos in Berlin

**Adash Agency | Berlin | Freelance / auf Projektbasis | 25 € pro Stunde**

## Du wolltest schon immer vor der Kamera stehen? Hier ist deine Ausrede.

Wir sind Adash – eine Berliner Kreativagentur, die Social-Media-Content produziert, der Leute tatsächlich zum Anhalten bringt. (Ja, das behaupten alle. Wir haben aber die Views, um es zu beweisen.)

Für unsere Video-Produktionen suchen wir Gesichter. Menschen, die vor der Kamera nicht einfrieren, sondern aufblühen. Schauspiel-Ausbildung? Brauchst du nicht. Instagram-Following? Egal. Was du brauchst, steht weiter unten – und es ist weniger, als du denkst.

## Was dich erwartet
* **Kurze, knackige Shootings:** ca. 2–3 Stunden pro Dreh. Kein 12-Stunden-Set, kein Warten im Regen.
* **Abwechslung, die süchtig macht:** Heute Streetwear-Brand, morgen Gastro, übermorgen Sanitärtechnik. Klingt random? Ist es auch – und genau deshalb wird es nie langweilig.
* **Alles ist vorbereitet:** Jeder Dreh läuft nach Plan und Skript. Du musst dir nichts ausdenken, nichts auswendig lernen wie im Theater – du bekommst klare Anweisungen und ein Team, das dich gut aussehen lässt.
* **Echtes Set-Feeling:** Professionelle Kamera, professionelle Crew, professioneller Content – und du mittendrin statt nur im Feed.
* **Content fürs eigene Portfolio:** Du sammelst Kamera-Erfahrung und Material, das du vorzeigen kannst.
## Was du mitbringen musst
* **Selbstbewusstsein.** Die Kamera merkt, ob du dich wohlfühlst. Du solltest Bock haben, gesehen zu werden.
* **Sicheres, sauberes Auftreten.** Pünktlich, zuverlässig, gepflegt – die Basics, die trotzdem nicht jeder draufhat.
* **Sonst: nichts.** Keine Vorkenntnisse, keine Schauspielschule, kein Showreel. Wir bringen dir alles bei, was du am Set wissen musst.
## Was du bekommst
* **25 € pro Stunde** – auch pauschal pro Shooting verhandelbar.
* Flexible Termine, die sich mit Studium, Job oder deinem Leben vereinbaren lassen.
* Ein Team, das Drehs ernst nimmt, sich selbst aber nicht zu ernst.
* Die Chance, regelmäßig gebucht zu werden, wenn's zwischen uns funkt.
## Wer wir sind

Adash Agency – Kreativ- und Social-Media-Agentur aus Berlin-Schöneberg. Wir produzieren Reels, Spots und Kampagnen für Marken aus Gastronomie, Handwerk, Fashion und allem dazwischen. Mit echter Crew, echten Darsteller:innen und Skripten, die auf Performance getrimmt sind.
## So bewirbst du dich

Kein Anschreiben. Kein Lebenslauf-Roman. Schick uns einfach:
1. **Ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo** (30–60 Sekunden, Handy reicht völlig): Wer bist du, warum willst du vor die Kamera?
2. **2–3 aktuelle Fotos** von dir.

📩 **[kontakt@adashcreatives.com](mailto:burc@adashcreatives.com)** 
📱 Instagram: **@Adash.Agency** 
📍 Shootings in Berlin

Wir melden uns bei allen zurück, die uns catchen. Und wenn du bis hierhin gelesen hast, ohne wegzuscrollen – gutes Zeichen. Genau diese Aufmerksamkeit wollen wir auch in unseren Videos.
