items.text:
**Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.

items.text:
Applications extended to Sunday 19th July!! 

Please follow the link below to submit your lovely self-tapes, as well as to find the audition pack:

sharedPost.text:
📣 ACTOR CALLOUT 🥂

Looking for our perfect Roger and David to star in the debut of *Speech, Speech* at SE Fest in London! 

Please follow the link below to submit your lovely self-tapes, as well as to find the audition pack:

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header)

If you have any additional access requirements, or any further questions then please message me directly, or email [tristan.simpson99@gmail.com](mailto:tristan.simpson99@gmail.com) 📧

Share far and wide with anyone you feel would be a good fit! 

We can’t wait to see them, go crazy with it  👀 🤪

items.text:
🎭 PERFORMING OPPORTUNITY – CASTING FOR 2026 🎭
✨ MPP Character Entertainment is now casting performers for 2026! ✨

We have an exciting year ahead filled with magical parties, immersive events and fairytale experiences! We are looking for talented performers to join our growing team!

📍 Location: Manchester & North West, UK

⸻

🌟 About the Role:

• Most events are based in Manchester and across the North West, so local performers are strongly preferred

• 🚗 A full driving licence and access to a car is required (petrol costs covered)

• 👑 Casting for a range of characters, you may be suited to multiple roles

• 🎭 A background in musical theatre, acting or performance is ideal

• 💖 We’re looking for performers who are bubbly, kind, reliable and confident working with children

We offer flexible opportunities including temporary work, short-term contracts, weekly bookings, and cover shifts, perfect whether you want regular work or occasional gigs ✨

⸻

📩 How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a recent headshot to:

📧Manager@MPPCharacterEntertainment.com

Or drop us a private message to register your interest 💌

🌐 Website: www.manchesterprincessparties.co.uk

We can’t wait to welcome new performers and create even more magical moments in 2026! ✨

MPP Character Entertainment

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎Casting Call 2026 M CHARACTER ENTERTAINMENT IMMEDIATE START WE ARE SPECIFICALLY LOOKING FOR RELIABLE, TALENTED & PASSIONATE PERFORMERS to JOIN OUR INCREDIBLE TEAM! صرحم INNING FAIRY EAIRY-TALE TALE CHARAANY CHARACTER COMPANY WASD REQUIREMENTS: MUSICAL THEATRE EXPERIENCE I FULL UK DRIVERS LICENSE GOOD AVAILABILITY I FRIENDLY & ANIMATED GREAT RATES OF PAY I I COSTUMES PROVIDED REWARDING ROLE FLEXIBLE WORK EMAIL: MANAGER@MPCHARACTERENTERTANNENT.O WITH A RECENT HEADSHOT AND YOUR CV FOR CONSIDERATION RPP‎'‎

items.title: URGENT CASTING!!!

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

“Way Back Home” Short Film 

Logline: A Korean American mother walks the path of grief while navigating her cultural connection to her father’s roots. Her journey captures how the heavy, isolating weight of parental loss changes us forever. 

Production Title: Way Back Home

Compensation: PAID, Travel and hotel stipend 

Audition Information: Virtual/Selftape 

Shooting Schedule: 

    •    Zoom table read - TBD
    •    Shoot dates Sept 2-6 

Shooting Location: Denver and Fort Collins, Colorado 

Non-Union 

Email: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com

This supporting role is very important to the overall story. Without this character, the lead has no clear direction. With that said, finding an older Korean male can be difficult so no experience is required but there has to be a desire to want to learn and be open-minded! 

Character Breakdown: 

APPA / HARABEOJI (Supporting)
Korean / East Asian
Actor will portray Appa at different stages of his life (40s/50s, 60s-70s):
Taekwondo Master and Dojo owner. Immigrated to the U.S. in the 1970s. A man building a life in a new country. Controlled and guarded, yet with glimpses of warmth beneath the surface and quite charismatic in his joyfulness for life. His physicality and stillness should communicate strength, sacrifice, and quiet determination.
A commanding presence — disciplined, dignified, and physically strong despite walking with a cane. His exterior is firm and authoritative, shaped by hardship and sacrifice, yet he carries a profound gentleness with those he loves and has an infectious smile. His face reflects lived experience: resilience, pride, and unspoken pain.

Must speak basic English and willing to speak some Korean, Native Korean speakers preferred. 

3 Days on Set

Please send your resume to: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com. 

We will email you the audition instructions.

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Actors, we see you. 💙

The endless self-tapes, radio silence after auditions, and constant anxiety — it’s draining. But the biggest barrier usually isn’t your talent. It’s a system that makes genuine connection harder.

Swipe through → to understand the challenges many actors face and why live auditions (when done right) can be incredibly valuable for you and the project.

At Gratwick, we’re committed to doing better. We champion actors with real support, respect, and meaningful opportunities — including live auditions where your full presence can shine.

Shoutout to our lead Antonio Sabato Jr — thank you for bringing so much heart to this project!

Ready to create with a team that has your back? Drop a 🎥 below or send us a message. We’d love to hear from you.

Tag an actor friend who needs this reminder 👇

#ActorsLife #Acting #LiveAuditions #ActorSupport #FilmProduction #Casting #IndieFilm

May be a graphic of text that says 'If nobody knows you yet, no creator can afford to cast you. Not because you cannot do the work. Because the money will not move.'

items.title: Actors, we see you. 💙

items.text:
**CASTING CALL | Irish and Scottish Actors (Unpaid)**

**Feature Film Table Read**
**Wednesday, 19 August | 6:00–9:00 PM UK Time | Remote via Zoom**

Hi! I'm Catryn, an American screenwriter who's spent the last several years developing **Of Mists & Gods**, an epic fantasy inspired by Irish mythology and set in Iron Age Ireland and Scotland.

One thing has always been important to me: **authenticity.**

No amount of research can replace hearing these characters spoken by people who grew up with the rhythms, humour, and music of Irish and Scottish voices. That's why I'm looking specifically for Irish and Scottish actors to help bring this world to life.

This isn't an audition for a finished production. It's an opportunity to collaborate on a screenplay that's actively moving through competitions, fellowships, producer meetings, and continued development. My goal is to hear the story through authentic performances, gather feedback, and create select audio clips that help introduce audiences to the world of *Of Mists & Gods*.

**What I'm Looking For**

The carousel includes lead, supporting, and additional speaking roles for:
* Irish actors
* Scottish actors
* Adults and one child (male)
* Experienced professionals and emerging performers alike

**Interested?**

Please **swipe through the character cards** and comment on the role (or roles) that interest you. If possible, include a link to your Spotlight profile, IMDb, demo reel, website, or another sample of your work.

**About the Story**

When her uncontrolled magic leads to the death of her young nephew, an aspiring druid flees across the sea hoping to rid herself of the very gift she's always dreamed of possessing. But as her grief-stricken sister rises among rival warriors, Niamh must learn to embrace her power or risk losing her new family.

I'd love to find actors who are excited by rich characters, mythology, and the chance to help shape a story from the ground up.

topComments.text: Unpaid and you want to use audio clips from the read without compensating the actors?
I'd love to bit sadly I'm not Irish or Scottish. I hope.you manage to get all the people you need and they work out really perfectly.  Good luck

items.text:
Calling all London-based Old Friends! 👋
We’re on the lookout for more Old Friends (60s, 70s+) to join us for some fun content days in London. No on camera experience needed — just real people up for something new! If that’s you, or you’ve got a parent, grandparent, or friend who’d be interested in featuring and is London-based, email us at ofc@pubitygroup.com!

💎Dance Diamonds💎  26.09. - 27.09.2026 international dance competition Germany !!!
🔥Die Registration / Anmeldung ist ab sofort bis zum 10.09.26 möglich:
https://www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟Der Tanzwettbewerb richtet sich an Amateur-Tänzerinnen und -Tänzer ab der Alterskategorie 10 Jahre bis zur offenen Altersklasse.
🌟Die Wettbewerbsteilnahme ist in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group,Group und Grand Group möglich.
🌟Der Wettbewerb umfasst eine Vielzahl unterschiedlicher Tanzstile. Darüber hinaus ist er für die Vorbereitung in verschiedenen Stufen für Performer oder Tanzgruppen vorgesehen.
🌟Competition program / Wettbewerbsprogramm:
💢​26.09.2026
Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Fortgeschritten/ Advanced:
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens;
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
All age groups and all dance styles.
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎- Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💢 27.09.2026
​Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Beginners/ Novices
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
💎Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
🌟All age groups and all dance styles.​
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎 - Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💥Registration/ Anmeldung bis 10.09. 2026 möglich / Registration is open until September 10, 2026.
🔥Das Wettbewerb präsentiert über Livestream für alle Interessenten kostenfrei und ohne extra Anmeldung über unsere Online Plattform.
💥Award -  die Bewertung läuft nach Punkten System von hochkarätige Jury.
Die Gewinner der 1 - 2 - 3 erhalten Pokale und Medaillen.
🏆 🥈🥈🥈 🥉🥉🥉 🥇🥇🥇 🏆
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
"Dance Diamonds Kids" 19.12. - 20.12.2026
Die Anmeldung ist vom 01.10.26 bis zum 06.12.26 möglich.
🌟Das Wettbewerb ist speziell für junge Performerinnen und Performer im Alter von 3 bis 12 Jahren organisiert. Die Teilnahme erfolgt in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group und Group.
🌟Zudem werden die Teilnehmer nach ihren Vorbereitungsstufen, sei es für Einzelperformer oder Tanzgruppen, in unterschiedliche Kategorien eingeteilt.
🌟Auf der Webseite www.art-element.de finden Sie detaillierte Informationen über unser Team, unsere Projekte- und Events - Programme sowie Archive.
Für weitere Fragen stehen wir Ihnen gerne telefonisch oder per WhatsApp: 0049-1577- 3131438 zur Verfügung.
💎DANCE DIAMONDS
Stadthalle Kleve, Lohstätte 7 · 47533 Kleve, NRW,Germany
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
Stadthalle Hückelhoven,Rathausplatz 1, 41836 Hückelhoven, NRW, Germany

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

items.text: Bogstaveligt talt ALLE kender dette simple trick til perfekt pillede hårdkogte æg. Hvordan kan det være, at du ikke ved det?? Jeg delte det i den første kommentar.

American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

items.text:
CASTING CALL

“Way Back Home” Short Film 

Logline: A Korean American mother walks the path of grief while navigating her cultural connection to her father’s roots. Her journey captures how the heavy, isolating weight of parental loss changes us forever. 

Production Title: Way Back Home

Compensation: PAID, Travel and hotel stipend 

Audition Information: Virtual/Selftape 

Shooting Schedule: 

    •    Zoom table read - TBD
    •    Shoot dates Sept 2-6 

Shooting Location: Denver and Fort Collins, Colorado 

Non-Union 

Email: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com

This supporting role is very important to the overall story. Without this character, the lead has no clear direction. With that said, finding an older Korean male can be difficult so no experience is required but there has to be a desire to want to learn and be open-minded! 

Character Breakdown: 

APPA / HARABEOJI (Supporting)
Korean / East Asian
Actor will portray Appa at different stages of his life (40s/50s, 60s-70s):
Taekwondo Master and Dojo owner. Immigrated to the U.S. in the 1970s. A man building a life in a new country. Controlled and guarded, yet with glimpses of warmth beneath the surface and quite charismatic in his joyfulness for life. His physicality and stillness should communicate strength, sacrifice, and quiet determination.
A commanding presence — disciplined, dignified, and physically strong despite walking with a cane. His exterior is firm and authoritative, shaped by hardship and sacrifice, yet he carries a profound gentleness with those he loves and has an infectious smile. His face reflects lived experience: resilience, pride, and unspoken pain.

Must speak basic English and willing to speak some Korean, Native Korean speakers preferred. 

3 Days on Set

Please send your resume to: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com. 

We will email you the audition instructions.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - PAID** 

Title: *Olive & Lemon*

Type: Independent Short

Location: Cedar City, Utah

Shoot Dates: September 9 - 15, 2026

Compensation: Day Rate. Meals, credit, Non-union. Travel and Lodging Included.

**To submit:**

Email the following to ojo.verdadero.llc@gmail.com:
* Name and age
* Current location (city/town)
* Recent photo
* Any acting experience 

ROLES:

**DAMON (Child) | Age 9–12**

Damon grows up relying on his older sister, Olivia, to protect him through a difficult home environment. When she leaves to study abroad, he feels abandoned and struggles to cope on his own. Over time, he shuts her out, isolating himself and removing all traces of her.

Requirements:
* Able to take direction
* No acting experience required (experience is a plus)
* Preferably dark hair

Note: A parent or legal guardian must be involved throughout the casting and production process.

**DAMON (Adult) | Age 25–30**

As a child, Damon depended on his older sister, Olivia, for comfort and protection in a troubled home. After she leaves to study abroad, he feels abandoned and gradually distances himself from her. As an adult, he becomes a librarian who prefers solitude, burying himself in books to avoid confronting his past. Following Olivia's sudden death, he is forced to face years of regret and unresolved grief. Through honoring her memory, he begins the difficult journey toward forgiveness and healing.

Requirements:
* Able to take direction
* No acting experience required (experience is a plus)
* Preferably dark hair

**MOM | 40s**

A mother who is emotionally distant and unable to provide the support her children need. Her presence creates a tense home environment, leaving a lasting impact on both of her children.

Requirements:
* Able to take direction
* No acting experience required (experience is a plus)
* Preferably dark hair and colored eyes

Hi all! We are casting for a short film, which is being created by a passionate crew of Capilano University alumni and students. 

This call is for the following 7 roles attached. 

It is volunteer and will be required for 1 day among the 4 dates listed below. If you already know that only a certain day will work among those, please let us know which. 

This film is art heavy, and some of the characters may be bearing quite a bit of make up.

If you are interested please email or DM me your headshots, mention which of the characters you are interested in (one or more), and if you have an acting reel, send that over aswell:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com

@arjungillfilm

P.S. If you are interested in the lead role, that call was posted in the group yesterday if you’d like to check it out.

items.text:
What if you, or someone you know, could find a place to unlock your true potential, and that is trusted by actors who want to train in an environment that is ambitious, focused, and creatively demanding?
Wouldn’t you want to be at the drama school that has not only won several awards for  ‘𝐁𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐃𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐚 𝐒𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐥 𝐎𝐟 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫’ for two years running – 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓/𝟐𝟔 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔/𝟐𝟕- but is also recognised by Spotlight as an ‘𝐀𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐲 𝐎𝐟 𝐄𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞’……………. 
𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐀𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐲!

Based in Swinton, Manchester, our classes are every Monday evening | 7pm–9pm, and are designed to strengthen technique, deepen instinct, and cultivate the confidence required to stand out in an increasingly competitive profession.

Focused areas of training include:
*Audition preparation
*Script analysis
*Character development
*Acting for camera
*And truthful performance

Whether you’re just starting or looking to elevate your skills, Marble Academy is where you receive a higher standard of acting training. 

So, if you are ready to invest in your career with purpose, passion and seriousness, book your audition dates now, and turn “𝐈’𝐝 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐚𝐜𝐭” into “𝐈’𝐦 𝐛𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐫.”

For information and enquiries:
www.marbleacademy.co.uk
marbleacademy@hotmail.com

DON’T BE AN ACTOR BECAUSE YOU WANT TO;
BE AN ACTOR BECAUSE YOU HAVE TO!

ZAGRAJ W FILMIE! EPIZOD! 

Trwają zdjęcia do nowego komediowego filmu dla najbardziej znanej platformy streamingowej!

Szukamy kobiet do epizodu 18-30 lat 

DATA: 16/07/2026 + kontynuacja 19/07

MIEJSCE: Warszawa, Pałac Kultury
STAWKA: 350 zł dzień 

ZGŁOSZENIA:
juliacast.kontakt@gmail.com

W TYTULE: EPZIOD

W TREŚCI: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejsce zamieszkania, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, KONIECZNIE wizytówka jako link na YouTube

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ZAGRAJ w FILMIE Szukamy dziewczyn 18-30 lat do epizodu'

items.text:
**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE - NOWA DATA **

**Wszystkie osoby, które już wysłały mi swoje zgłoszenie i są dostępne w nowym terminie - uprzejmie proszę o podbicie mi maila i potwierdzenie dostępności!**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem 

**Wymagana umiejętność u wszystkich – śpiew aktorski / dobry śpiew amatorski i doświadczenie przed kamerą!**

Role epizodyczne nie mówione ale śpiewane, na dalszym etapie castingu wybrane osoby poproszę o nagranie wskazanej piosenki. 

**Prawa na 5 lat bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, pola eksploatacji TV, internet, kino, radio, outdoor, POS. **

**Zdjęcia 10 sierpnia 2026 w Krakowie (okolicach)**. 

Nie zapewniamy noclegu, ewentualnie zwrot kosztów dojazdu (paliwa, bilety na pociąg).

Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciami, wideo wizytówką i danymi do kontaktu proszę przesyłać na adres: castingotwarty@gmail.com w tytule proszę o wpisanie roli, do której się zgłaszacie. 

Nie przyjmuję zaproszeń do znajomych, nie wchodzę w 

konwersacje pod postem i na priv - skontaktuję się z wybranymi osobami.

Dziękuję :)

items.text:
Poszukujemy bohaterek (kobiet) w rodzinnych relacjach w wieku 18-80 lat (szukamy na przykład: mamy z córką, babcia z wnuczką, siostry, kuzynki, ciocia z siostrzenicą, prababcia i prawnuczka, matka chrzestna i córka chrzestna, teściowa i synowa, bratowa i szwagierka, dwie szwagierki, stryjenka i bratanica itp.) do kolejnych odcinków nowego programu realizowanego dla stacji telewizyjnej.

1. Szukamy dwóch kobiet, których łączy autentyczna rodzinna relacja. Najważniejsze jest, aby była między nimi naturalna chemia, wspólna historia i swoboda w kontakcie ze sobą, bo będą wspólnie występować w odcinku i siebie wspierać w wyborach stylizacji.

2. Tematem odcinka będzie metamorfoza modowa. Nasze bohaterki, przy wsparciu stylistów, będą poszukiwać idealnego stylu dopasowanego do konkretnego wydarzenia.

3. Zdjęcia będą realizowane w lipcu i sierpniu w Warszawie i będą to całodniowe nagrania. Dokładne terminy są do uzgodnienia.

4. Wynagrodzenie, jakie proponujemy: 700 zł netto/osoba. Razem 2 osoby 1 400 zł netto (płatne w ciągu 1 dnia po nagraniach — BLIK/konto bankowe)

5. Szukamy osób, które nie są kojarzone z wcześniejszych udziałów w popularnych programach telewizyjnych, reality show czy serialach. Chcemy pracować z autentycznymi bohaterkami, z którymi widzowie będą mogli się utożsamić.

Dodatkowo zależałoby nam, aby po zakończeniu zdjęć uczestniczki nie pojawiały się przez około 2–3 miesiące w innych programach telewizyjnych lub serialach, które mogłyby wpłynąć na odbiór ich udziału w naszym formacie.

6. Będziemy potrzebowali krótkich filmów zgłoszeniowych od kandydatek. Program opiera się w dużej mierze na relacjach, emocjach i rozmowach z bohaterkami, dlatego bardzo zależy nam na osobach, które czują się swobodnie przed kamerą i potrafią naturalnie opowiadać o sobie.

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację dwóch osób:

1. Imię i nazwisko swoje oraz drugiej osoby

2. Rok urodzenia obu pań

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefony kontaktowe

5. Adresy e-mail

6. Wzrost obu pań

7. Link do swojego profilu na Facebooku oraz drugiej osoby

8. Krótki opis dotychczasowego doświadczenia

9. Krótkie nagranie video wraz z podstawowymi informacjami o relacji. Najlepiej, jeśli będzie to nagranie wspólnie dwóch pań.

10. Minimum po 1 zdjęć z każdej pań

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Program TV bohaterki

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w programie zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

items.text:
🎬 Cześć Warszawo! 🎬
Nowy serial!

Kochani, szukam Panów – statystów do ról ekipy filmowej.

👨 Kogo szukamy?

• Mężczyźni w wieku 25–45 lat.

📅 Terminy zdjęć:

21.07–29.07, z wyłączeniem 26.07 (niedziela).

Łącznie 8 dni zdjęciowych, dlatego prosimy o dyspozycyjność we wszystkich terminach.

💰 Stawka:

130 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy, płatne przelewem po zakończeniu ostatniego dnia zdjęciowego.

📩 Zgłoszenia:

Wyślij mail na plan@filmakcja.pl.

Tytuł wiadomości:

Serial 21–29.07

W treści maila podaj:

• imię i nazwisko,

• wiek,

• numer telefonu,

• wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki.

Czekam na Wasze zgłoszenia!

Marta Filmakcja ☺️🎬

🎬 Cześć Warszawo! 🎬
Nowy serial!

Kochani, szukam Panów – statystów do ról ekipy filmowej.

👨 Kogo szukamy?

• Mężczyźni w wieku 25–45 lat.

📅 Terminy zdjęć:

21.07–29.07, z wyłączeniem 26.07 (niedziela).

Łącznie 8 dni zdjęciowych, dlatego prosimy o dyspozycyjność we wszystkich terminach.

💰 Stawka:

130 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy, płatne przelewem po zakończeniu ostatniego dnia zdjęciowego.

📩 Zgłoszenia:

Wyślij mail na plan@filmakcja.pl.

Tytuł wiadomości:

Serial 21–29.07

W treści maila podaj:

• imię i nazwisko,

• wiek,

• numer telefonu,

• wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki.

Czekam na Wasze zgłoszenia!

Marta Filmakcja ☺️🎬

items.text:
STAWKI za STATYSTOWANIE
Dzisiaj pewien grupowicz dał kilka postów związanych ze stawkami agencji. Istotnie kwoty, jakie wszyscy widzimy za statystowanie są niekiedy cholernie niskie, bo np. np. 100zł za 10h, czy też mniej, zadowalające nie jest.

Pamiętajcie jednak wszyscy o jednej, dość istotnej rzeczy, którą jest fakt, że to statyści podejmują decyzję. Chcesz iść za 100zł na 8h? Proszę bardzo! Chcesz iść za 150 na 12h? Też dobrze! To są jednakże Wasze i ich decyzje. Trzeba też przyznać, że nie zawsze plan trwa 10h, a jest to niekiedy grubo mniej czasu niż w/w.

Muszę jednak stanąć po stronie agencji, bo grupa nie jest od tego, aby wylewać swoje żale. Pod takimi postami często są komentarze zgłaszane do FB, z których to ja jestem rozliczany.

Nie wiem, czym tak naprawdę wspomniany grupowicz się kierował, ale w pewnym momencie zaczął jechać po kolejnej już agencji. Jego posty zyskały jednakże dużo reakcji. Dwiema były zgłoszenia do mnie.

Biorąc pod uwagę fakt, że w regulaminie grupy jest info o zakazie szkalowania agencji, to musiałem go zablokować. Pamiętajcie też, że jeśli agencja nie płaci, co niestety czasem ma miejsce, to droga sądowa Wam pomoże, czy też PIP o ile to ich brocha. FB Wam nie pomoże ... prawie.

topComments.text: Czy faktycznie PIP zajmie się sprawą braku wynagrodzenia, skoro praca statysty odbywa się na podstawie umowy o dzieło?

100 zł to było minimum za statystowanie jakie dostawałem kiedy kręcono serial Usta, usta. 

Dziś ta kwota za nawet mniej niż 10 h to bardzo mało.

items.text:
A Conversation initiated by TheWorkbook and Center Stage Magazine about the Future of Voice....

 

Use this link to read the June/July Edition of Center Stage Magazine https://publications.castingworkbook.com/center-stage-june-2026-u32t4yfpma/full-view.html

 

 

There has never been a more important time to talk about the human voice and the person behind it.

In our current June/July edition of Center Stage by TheWorkbook, we sat down with Tim Friedlander, Tanya Buchanan, Simon Kennedy, and Memo Sauceda, the Presidents of the Voice Actor Associations in the United States, Canada, Australia, and LATAM, respectively, along with many others. The conversations kept landing in the same place: audiences want connection, clients want authenticity, and the performers who understand that the voice is the vehicle, not the destination, are the ones building careers that last.

This edition isn’t a panic piece about AI. It’s the opposite. It’s a front-row seat to an industry that is getting clearer about what it values.

Watch the trailer below as Host Trevar Fox introduces his interview with Tim, Tanya, Simon, and Memo and click the link in the comments to read the full edition.

 

https://youtu.be/nFvuG6vXk5U?si=n2QsDtcdp3UPmGUJ

sharedPost.text:
🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

💡 Value Highlight: Learn directly from a DP/Director whose professional rate is $1,500/day 

this 4-session online workshop gives you real film-level expertise at a fraction of that cost!
Price on enquiry.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype
"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name
🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.
🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach).

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill
📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):
Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."
The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"
Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.
Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.
Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call
📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable
🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point
📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew
🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.
Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)
🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape
📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:
Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.
Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.
Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:
Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.
Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux
📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

Final Performance (Day 4):
Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?
This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:
mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com
Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE — PAID SUPPORTING ROLE

I’m looking for an actress to play Mrs. Wallace, Tess’s mother, in my upcoming short film The Gift. It is a small but important supporting role with a brief driveway scene and natural dialogue.

Role: Mrs. Wallace
Playing age: 40–50
Race: White
Shoot date: August 5, 2026
Shoot time: 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM
Shoot location: Denver metro area
Compensation: $100

Required availability:

Online team meeting on July 20
In-person rehearsal near Castle Rock on July 22, approximately three hours in the evening
Filming on August 5 from 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM

A brief audition tape will be required.

Previous work can be found by searching Forrainfilms on YouTube.

To be considered, please email your name, a recent photo, contact information, and any acting materials or relevant experience to sunburstcinema@gmail.com with the subject line “Mrs. Wallace Casting.”

Please send all inquiries via email. No DMs, please.

Thank you!!!

items.text:
Casting Call

"A Bad Person"

LOGLINE: A small-time con artist, already having the worst day of his life, receives a visit from his ex-wife

Production Title: A Bad Person

Genre: Drama

Production Type: Indie

Compensation: Paid. 

Audition Information: Virtual/Self Tape

Shooting Schedule:

● Rehearsal  Saturday 8/8

● Shoot Sunday 8/9 & Saturday 8/15 & Sunday 8/16

Shooting Location: Commerce City, CO

Email: andrew@westofcenterfilms.com

Character Breakdowns:

CALVIN MALE (30s-40s)

A small-time scam artist, who has expanded his efforts into a large warehouse full of employees. We meet him on possibly the worst day of his life, where, after finding out his mother has died, he receives an unexpected visit from his ex-wife, whom he very much still loves. The drama takes place between these two characters, as they try to navigate a possible reunion amidst the chaos taking place all around them. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), intensity, and on-screen magnetism. We don’t have to like him, but we do have to care about him.

SUZIE Female (40s-60s)

A well-intentioned–but somewhat hapless–assistant to a small-time con artist, Suzie has the habit of making bad situations into worse ones. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), funny, charming, and a pure scene-stealer.

PA / EXTRA (18+)

A hybrid role consisting of helping out production, while appearing in the background of scenes, with possible dialogue. Experience isn’t the biggest factor, mainly looking for someone with a great attitude and bundles of energy who is keen to learn. The days will be active and long, but extremely fun. 

Please send your resume to andrew@westofcenterfilms.com. Let us know if your avalable on the day of rehearsal and shooting day. Let us know if your SAG and upon request, I'll email you the attached side. Self-tape by Friday, July 17th. Early submissions is awsome.

items.text:
Kick Ass Film Fest is gearing up for a massive Season 7, and we want YOU on our board. We are on a mission to build the future of indie film in our state, and we need your passion to make the 2027 Spring Festival our best yet.
What you’ll be doing: Helping us run epic Fall Meet & Greets (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder), organizing Spring screening premieres, and planning the ultimate Awards Show.
Why join?
    •    Compete anyway: You can still enter the competition!  You won’t be involved in the competition portion of planning the festival.  
    •    Level up with us: This is a volunteer role, but as we grow, there will be opportunities for these to turn into official, expanded positions.
Let’s unite the Colorado film scene. Who’s ready to make some magic? 👇 Drop a 🎥 in the comments if you want to learn more!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScSY-u1zenlnh8lXRaQi3Lr9O93x5Zg4Ca06YChhft1Db2saQ/viewform

sharedPost.text:
Kickass Film Fest is growing, and we’re looking for passionate creatives, film lovers, organizers, and community builders to join our volunteer board.

This volunteer team will help support the events leading up to our 2027 Spring Festival, including:

Fall Meet & Greet networking events (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder)
Spring screening premiere events 
Spring Festival Awards Show Planning
Note: You will not be part of the competition planning, but you can still participate in the competition.

This is a volunteer board, but as KAFF continues to grow, there may be opportunities to grow into official roles or expanded positions on a case-by-case basis.

If you want to help us for Kickass Film Fest Season 7 and help us build the future of independent film in Southern Colorado, we’d love to hear from you!

Apply here: https://forms.gle/SaF2u71YJhbFNXAq9

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Giovanni, and I'm a fashion & portrait photographer from the Netherlands. I'll be visiting **Berlin from July 20th to July 22nd**, and I'm looking to collaborate with a **male model (18+), tall, athletic/muscular build**, for an intimate, editorial-style direct flash photoshoot.

My photography is inspired by 90s fashion campaigns, with a candid, classy, and cinematic aesthetic. This is **not** an explicit shoot, but it is sensual and fashion-oriented.

If you're interested or know someone who might be a great fit, feel free to send me a message!

📍 Berlin, Germany
📅 July 20 to July 22
📸 Instagram: **@giotimoteo**

MOVIETIME KW 29/2026

CHRISTOPHER NOLANS KINO RÜCKKEHR UND DIE KAULITZ BRÜDER.

Der Starregisseur ist nach 3jähriger Abstinenz zurück und nahm sich der antiken Story von Homer an. Ob die bildgewaltige DIE ODYSSEE mit ihrem Starensemble der Meilenstein des heurigen Kinosommers ist, erfahren Sie in unserer Sendung.

Wetten dass ? Bill & Tom Kaulitz auch als Synchronsprecher etwas haben. Im Startalk zu Minions & Monster geben die beiden einen kleinen Einblick in diese Arbeit.

Auch der österreichische Film hat in dieser Sendung seinen Platz. Im Gespräch mit Sarah Fuchs erzählt Samira Fux über ihren Film PILIJI.

In Punkto Musik knallen wir wieder die besten Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre übern Äther.

Mittwoch 15.7.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
Vi søger 2 ensemblemedlemmer til FORVOKSET (ULØNNET)
På grund af et afbud søger vi 2 personer, der har lyst til at blive en del af forestillingen FORVOKSET.

📅 Periode: Juli – 18. august (ikke alle dage – skriv for prøveplan).

📍 Prøver: Hillerød og Gilleleje.

🎭 Spillesteder: Aveny-T, Remisen og Elværket.

Vi søger dig, der: 

• Har mulighed for at deltage i prøve- og spilleperioden.

• Har lyst til at indgå i et tæt og ambitiøst ensemble. 

• Er engageret, nysgerrig og klar på en intensiv og kreativ proces.

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig – alle er velkomne!

Om forestillingen:

Forvokset handler om den fortid og de traumer, der fortsat vokser i os som voksne. Forestillingen er en fortolkning og videreudvikling af udvalgte digte fra digtsamlingen Skyggesider af Janus Hald.

(Læs mere på facebooksiden  Oh no shiit eller instagram @oh.no.shit.insta )

Kan du træde til med kort varsel – eller kender du én, der kunne være interesseret? Så skriv til os hurtigst muligt.

Vi bliver meget glade, hvis du vil dele opslaget i dit netværk😊

Skriv til os på mail: oh.no.shit.kontakt@gmail.com

topComments.text: Hej Malou Holm - måske mig? Sendt dig pb ihvertfald 💫💫💫

items.text:
Für einen Werbespot eines großen Lebensmitteldiscounters suche ich verschiedene Menschen türkischer Herkunft

Gerne kannst du dich zusammen mit deiner Familie bewerben denn ich suche folgende Personen:

Junge (11 - 15 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft der ein talentierter Fussballspieler ist

Vater (30-45 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

Mutter (30-45 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

Großmutter (60-75 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

älterer Bruder/Schwester/Cousine / Cousin (15-19 Jahre alt)

Die Fakten zum Dreh:

Wann: wir drehen zwischen dem 22.-24.7. 2026

Wo: wir drehen in Tallin (Estland)

Wir bräuchten dich/euch zwischen dem 19.7. - 25.7. (inkl. An- Abreise / Fitting /Dreh)

Reise + Unterkunftskosten werden von der Produktion übernommen.

Schauspielerische Vorerfahrungen sind keine Voraussetzung. Es wird keinen Text geben der gelernt werden muss.

Pro Person gibt es (mit Drehhonorar + Buyout) mind. 2500 € (für die Rollen der Erwachsenen 3.500 € oder mehr)

Interesse?

Melde dich fix (spätestens bis zum 7.7.) mit einem Foto von dir per Mail bei: info@dokucasting.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '၁ Diverse Menschen türkischer her Herkunft für Werbespot gesucht'
